items.situation: study abroad information session with returned students
items.announcement: Good afternoon, students. The Global Programs Office is hosting a study abroad information session this Thursday at four o'clock in the Lincoln Hall lounge. We're bringing together advisors and a panel of classmates who just got back from a semester overseas, so you'll hear what daily life and coursework were really like. We'll walk through application steps, course credit, and the funding options that make these programs affordable. The session is open to every major and every class year, and no sign-up is needed. If you can't make it, please pick up the printed program guide available at the front desk afterward.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To collect applications for next semester's overseas programs
options.B: To invite students to a study abroad information session
options.C: To announce that course credit rules for travel have changed
options.D: To recruit students who have returned to lead future trips

questions.explanation: 通告目的是邀请学生参加留学信息说明会，B 正确。A 通告并非现场收取申请，而是介绍流程，属错误目的；C 通告只是会上讲解学分，并未宣布规则变更，属错误目的；D 通告说归国学生是分享经验的嘉宾，并非招募他们带队，属错误目的。

questions.stem: What does the speaker say students should do if they cannot attend?

options.A: Email the Global Programs Office for a recording
options.B: Sign up online for the next available session
options.C: Speak directly with a returned student panelist
options.D: Pick up a printed program guide at the front desk

questions.explanation: 通告明确说不能到场者可事后到前台领取打印的项目指南，D 正确。A 通告从未提到录像或发邮件，属未提及内容；B 通告说无需报名，且未提下一场报名，属未提及内容；C 嘉宾是说明会上的分享者，通告没说缺席者可单独找他们交谈，属张冠李戴。

items.situation: campus bookstore moving to a new building
items.announcement: Attention students and staff. The campus bookstore is moving to its new home on the ground floor of the Student Union starting next Monday. The old location in Harper Hall will close this Friday at five o'clock so staff can pack and transfer inventory over the weekend. The new store offers a larger textbook section, a coffee counter, and longer evening hours. While the shelves are being moved, all online orders will still ship on time without interruption. Please note that any textbook rentals due this week should be returned to the new Student Union location, not the old one.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To inform the campus that the bookstore is relocating
options.B: To advertise a new coffee counter opening on campus
options.C: To apologize for a delay in shipping online orders
options.D: To encourage students to rent rather than buy textbooks

questions.explanation: 通告核心是告知书店搬迁到学生中心，A 正确。B 咖啡台只是新店的附带特色，把它当主旨属以偏概全；C 通告明说线上订单照常按时发货，并无延误致歉，属错误目的；D 通告只是说明租书归还地点，并未鼓励租书，属错误目的。

questions.stem: Where should students return textbook rentals due this week?

options.A: To the old Harper Hall location before Friday
options.B: To any campus library drop box over the weekend
options.C: To the new bookstore in the Student Union
options.D: By mailing them back through the online order system

questions.explanation: 通告明确说本周到期的租书应归还到学生中心的新店，C 正确。A 与事实相反，Harper Hall 旧址周五关闭，不应在此归还，属改动事实；B 通告从未提到图书馆投递箱，属未提及内容；D 通告说线上订单照常发货，与归还租书无关，属张冠李戴。

items.situation: campus shuttle route change due to construction
items.announcement: Attention students, faculty, and staff. Starting next Monday, the campus shuttle will follow a new route because of construction near the Engineering Building. The shuttle will no longer stop at the West Quad station for the next three weeks. Instead, riders heading to that area should get off at the Library stop and walk five minutes north. Buses will continue to run every fifteen minutes during regular hours. We're sorry for any inconvenience, and the updated route map is now posted at every shuttle stop and on the transportation page of the university website.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain a temporary change to the shuttle route
options.B: To announce that shuttle service is ending
options.C: To recruit drivers for the campus shuttle
options.D: To describe a new Engineering Building

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通知的核心是因施工导致班车路线临时调整，明确说明改道、停靠点变化和持续时间。B错误（reversed_intent）：班车并未停运，仍每十五分钟一班，只是改道。C错误（wrong_purpose）：通知完全没有提到招募司机。D错误（too_narrow/wrong_purpose）：施工的工程楼只是改道的原因，通知不是在介绍这栋楼。

questions.stem: What should riders heading to the West Quad area do?

options.A: Wait at the West Quad station as usual
options.B: Take a taxi to the Engineering Building
options.C: Get off at the Library stop and walk north
options.D: Use the shuttle only during evening hours

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通知明确指出前往该区域的乘客应在图书馆站下车，然后向北步行五分钟。A错误（wrong_detail，与原文相反）：West Quad站在三周内停用，不能照常等车。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：通知从未提及打车。D错误（misattributed_detail）：班车在常规时间正常每十五分钟运行，并非只在晚间运营。

items.situation: community garden spring cleanup volunteer event
items.announcement: Hello, everyone. As the coordinator of the Green Campus program, I'd like to invite you to our spring cleanup of the community garden this Saturday. We'll be removing winter weeds and preparing the soil for planting, starting at 10 a.m. behind Foster Hall. Gloves and tools will be provided, but please wear closed-toe shoes and clothing you don't mind getting muddy. No gardening experience is needed, and you can stay for as long or as little as you like. To help us plan snacks, please add your name to the sign-up sheet outside the program office by Friday afternoon.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain new rules for using the garden
options.B: To announce that the garden is closing
options.C: To advertise a gardening course for credit
options.D: To invite volunteers to a garden cleanup

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。通知的核心是邀请大家参加本周六的社区花园春季清理志愿活动。A错误（wrong_purpose）：通知没有解释使用花园的新规定。B错误（reversed_intent）：花园不是要关闭，而是要清理并为种植做准备。C错误（wrong_purpose）：这不是一门可获学分的课程，而是一次志愿活动。

questions.stem: Why does the speaker ask people to sign up by Friday?

options.A: Because space in the garden is very limited
options.B: So the program can prepare enough snacks
options.C: Because only experienced gardeners may join
options.D: So volunteers can be assigned to teams

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。通知明确说明请大家周五下午前报名是为了帮助他们安排零食，因此可推断报名是为了准备足够的零食。A错误（over_inference）：通知没有提到名额有限，反而说想待多久都行。C错误（unrelated_inference，与原文相反）：通知说不需要园艺经验。D错误（over_inference）：通知从未提到把志愿者分组。

items.situation: LinkedIn profile photo day at career center
items.announcement: Hi, everyone. The Career Center is excited to host a free LinkedIn Photo Day this Friday from 11 a.m. to 3 p.m. in the lobby of Bishop Hall. A professional photographer will be on site to take headshots you can use on your LinkedIn profile or job applications. We recommend dressing in business attire, since the photos are meant to look professional. There's no cost, but spots are limited, so please reserve a time slot through the Career Center website in advance. Your edited photo will be emailed to you within one week of the event.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To promote a free professional headshot event
options.B: To explain how to build a LinkedIn profile
options.C: To announce a new dress code on campus
options.D: To advertise a paid photography workshop

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通知的核心是宣传职业中心举办的免费LinkedIn拍照日，由专业摄影师为学生拍摄职业头像。B错误（wrong_purpose）：通知是关于拍照活动，而非教如何搭建LinkedIn主页。C错误（wrong_purpose）：建议穿正装只是针对这次拍照，并非全校新着装规定。D错误（wrong_detail/wrong_purpose）：活动是免费的，也不是一个收费的摄影工作坊。

questions.stem: Why does the speaker recommend wearing business attire?

options.A: Because casual clothing is banned in Bishop Hall
options.B: Because the photographer charges less for it
options.C: So the photos look suitable for professional use
options.D: Because the event is a formal awards ceremony

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通知说明建议穿正装是因为这些照片要显得专业，因此可推断穿正装是为了让照片适合用于求职等正式用途。A错误（over_inference）：通知没有说Bishop Hall禁止休闲着装，只是给出穿衣建议。B错误（unrelated_inference）：活动完全免费，摄影师不存在收费高低之说。D错误（over_inference）：这是拍照活动，并非正式颁奖典礼。

items.situation: student lounge furniture upgrade and temporary relocation
items.announcement: Attention students. The second-floor student lounge in the Union Building will be closed next week so that the old furniture can be replaced with new seating and study tables. The work is scheduled to begin Monday morning and should be finished by Friday afternoon. While the lounge is closed, students are welcome to use the temporary study space set up in Room 105 on the first floor. Please note that the vending machines on the second floor will remain accessible throughout the week. We appreciate your patience and think you'll really enjoy the upgraded space when it reopens.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To inform students of a temporary lounge closure for upgrades
options.B: To announce that the Union Building is closing permanently
options.C: To ask students to donate old furniture
options.D: To explain new rules for using the study tables

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通知的核心是告知学生二楼休息室将临时关闭以更换新家具，并提供临时学习空间。B错误（reversed_intent）：关闭的只是二楼休息室且是临时的，整栋Union大楼并未永久关闭。C错误（wrong_purpose）：通知是替换旧家具，并未请学生捐赠家具。D错误（wrong_purpose）：通知没有解释使用学习桌的新规定。

questions.stem: Where can students study while the lounge is closed?

options.A: At the vending machine area on the second floor
options.B: In the library's upper-floor reading room
options.C: In a temporary space in Room 105 on the first floor
options.D: In the Union Building basement

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通知明确说明休息室关闭期间，学生可使用一楼105房间设置的临时学习空间。A错误（misattributed_detail）：二楼自动售货机只是保持可用，并非学习空间。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：通知从未提到图书馆阅览室。D错误（related_but_not_stated）：通知没有提及任何地下室空间。

items.situation: study abroad program application info session
items.announcement: Good morning, students. The Office of International Programs will hold an information session about next year's study abroad opportunities this Tuesday at 4 p.m. in Carver Hall, Room 120. An advisor will explain the partner universities available, the application timeline, and how credits transfer back to your degree. Please be aware that to apply, you'll need at least one full year of study completed by the time you go abroad. Applications open the following Monday and close on November 15th. If you can't attend in person, a recording will be posted on the international programs page later that week.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce the cancellation of study abroad programs
options.B: To inform students about a study abroad information session
options.C: To list the courses offered at partner universities
options.D: To remind students to renew their passports

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。通知的核心是告知学生关于明年留学项目的信息说明会，并介绍合作院校、申请时间线和学分转换。A错误（reversed_intent）：项目不是被取消，而是正在介绍和开放申请。C错误（too_narrow）：合作院校只是说明会的一部分内容，且通知没有列出具体课程。D错误（wrong_purpose）：通知从未提到护照或续签事宜。

questions.stem: What is required in order to apply for study abroad?

options.A: Having completed at least one year of study
options.B: Submitting two letters of recommendation
options.C: Attending the information session in person
options.D: Paying a deposit by November 15th

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通知明确说明申请的前提是出国时至少已完成一整年的学业。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：通知从未提到推荐信。C错误（wrong_detail，与原文相反）：通知说不能到场可看录像，因此现场出席并非申请条件。D错误（misattributed_detail）：11月15日是申请截止日期，而非缴纳押金的要求。

items.situation: new bike registration requirement on campus
items.announcement: Attention students and staff. Beginning this fall, all bicycles parked on campus must be registered with Campus Safety. This new policy is meant to help us return lost or stolen bikes to their owners more quickly. Registration is completely free and takes only a few minutes at the Campus Safety office in Lowell Hall. Once registered, you'll receive a small sticker to attach to your bike frame. Please note that unregistered bicycles found after October 1st may be tagged with a warning. To register, bring your bike and student ID to the office any weekday between 9 a.m. and 5 p.m.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce a new bike registration requirement
options.B: To warn that bike parking is no longer allowed
options.C: To advertise bicycles for sale on campus
options.D: To explain how to repair a damaged bike

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通知的核心是宣布从今秋起所有校内停放的自行车必须在校园安全办公室登记的新政策。B错误（reversed_intent）：自行车停放并未被禁止，只是需要登记。C错误（wrong_purpose）：通知不是在出售自行车。D错误（wrong_purpose）：通知没有涉及如何修理自行车。

questions.stem: What should students bring in order to register a bike?

options.A: A receipt showing the bike's purchase price
options.B: A registration fee paid in cash
options.C: Their bike and student ID to the office
options.D: A completed form mailed in advance

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通知明确说明登记时要把自行车和学生证带到办公室。A错误（related_but_not_stated）：通知从未提到购买收据或价格。B错误（wrong_detail，与原文相反）：登记是完全免费的，无需缴费。D错误（misattributed_detail）：登记是本人带车到现场办理，并非邮寄表格。

items.situation: guest author reading and book signing in the library
items.announcement: Good evening, everyone. The English Department is delighted to announce that award-winning novelist Clara Mendez will visit campus next Thursday for a public reading and book signing. The event will take place at 6 p.m. in the main reading room of Whitman Library. Ms. Mendez will read from her latest novel and then take questions from the audience. Copies of her books will be available for purchase at the door, and she'll happily sign them afterward. Admission is free and open to the public, so feel free to bring friends and family. We hope to see a great turnout next Thursday evening.

questions.stem: What is the announcement mainly about?

options.A: A creative writing course taught by a novelist
options.B: A visiting author's public reading and book signing
options.C: A sale of used books at the campus library
options.D: A change in the library's evening hours

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。通知的核心是宣布获奖小说家Clara Mendez将到校举办公开朗读和签售活动。A错误（wrong_purpose）：这是一次朗读签售活动，而非一门写作课程。C错误（wrong_detail）：现场出售的是作者本人的新书，并非二手书义卖。D错误（wrong_purpose）：通知没有提到图书馆开放时间的变化。

questions.stem: What is true about attending the event?

options.A: Tickets must be reserved in advance
options.B: Only English majors may attend
options.C: Admission is free and open to the public
options.D: Attendees must buy a book to enter

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通知明确说明活动免费且向公众开放，欢迎带亲友参加。A错误（related_but_not_stated）：通知没有提到需要提前预订门票。B错误（wrong_detail，与原文相反）：活动对公众开放，并不限于英语专业学生。D错误（wrong_detail）：可以在门口购书，但购书并非入场条件。

items.situation: new student orientation schedule and requirements
items.announcement: Good morning, incoming students. Welcome to fall orientation week. Your mandatory orientation session begins this Thursday at 9 a.m. in Harper Hall, and it should wrap up by early afternoon. During the session, you'll meet your academic advisor, tour the main campus, and learn how to register for spring classes. Please remember to bring your student ID card, since you won't be able to check in without it. We'll provide a light breakfast and all the materials you'll need, so there's nothing else to prepare. If you have a scheduling conflict, contact the orientation office before Wednesday to arrange a makeup session.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain the orientation schedule and what to bring
options.B: To describe how to register for spring classes
options.C: To recruit student volunteers for campus tours
options.D: To announce a change in advisor assignments

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告整体在介绍新生迎新会的时间、地点、内容以及需要携带的物品，属于对日程和要求的总体说明。B错误（too_narrow）：登记春季课程只是迎新会的一个环节，不是整篇的目的。C错误（wrong_purpose）：公告从未招募志愿者，校园参观是新生体验的一部分而非招募。D错误（wrong_purpose）：公告提到会见导师，但并未宣布任何导师分配的变更。

questions.stem: What are students required to bring to the session?

options.A: A printed copy of their class schedule
options.B: Their own breakfast and snacks
options.C: Their student ID card
options.D: A list of questions for their advisor

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。公告明确说"Please remember to bring your student ID card, since you won't be able to check in without it"，学生证是唯一要求携带的物品。A错误（related_but_not_stated）：公告说会教学生如何登记春季课程，但没有要求携带课表。B错误（wrong_detail）：公告说会提供清淡早餐，与自带早餐恰好相反。D错误（related_but_not_stated）：会见导师确有提及，但并未要求准备问题清单。

items.situation: career fair preparation workshop with resume review
items.announcement: Hello, students. With the fall career fair just two weeks away, the Career Center is hosting a preparation workshop this Monday at 4 p.m. in the Brandt Center, room 105. We'll walk you through how to research employers, practice your introduction, and dress for success. The second half of the workshop is devoted to one-on-one resume reviews with our advisors, so please bring a printed copy of your current resume. There's no need to register in advance; just show up and sign in at the door. Seating is limited, though, so we recommend arriving a few minutes early to claim a spot.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce the date of the fall career fair
options.B: To explain a new dress code for campus interviews
options.C: To invite students to a career fair preparation workshop
options.D: To collect resumes for employers at the fair

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。公告整体在邀请学生参加招聘会准备工作坊，并说明内容、时间和地点。A错误（too_narrow）：招聘会的时间只是背景信息，公告的重点是工作坊本身。B错误（wrong_purpose）："dress for success"只是工作坊的一个环节，并非宣布新的着装规定。D错误（wrong_purpose）：简历是用于现场点评，不是为雇主收集。

questions.stem: What are students asked to bring to the workshop?

options.A: A printed copy of their resume
options.B: A completed registration form
options.C: A list of target employers
options.D: Professional interview attire

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告明确要求"please bring a printed copy of your current resume"用于一对一简历点评。B错误（wrong_detail）：公告说无需提前注册，直接到场签到即可，与带注册表相反。C错误（related_but_not_stated）：工作坊会教如何研究雇主，但没有要求带雇主清单。D错误（related_but_not_stated）："dress for success"是讲解话题，并未要求当天穿着面试正装。

items.situation: course registration deadline and add/drop period reminder
items.announcement: I want to remind everyone that the deadline to register for spring courses is this Friday at 11:59 p.m. After that, late registration will reopen in January, but a fifty-dollar late fee will apply. Keep in mind that classes filling popular requirements tend to reach capacity quickly, so I'd encourage you to finalize your schedule sooner rather than later. The add/drop period runs through the first two weeks of the semester, giving you time to adjust your courses without penalty. If a class you need is already full, be sure to join the waitlist, since spots often open up during add/drop. Reach out to your advisor if you run into any trouble.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To remind students of the registration deadline and related policies
options.B: To announce that several spring courses have been canceled
options.C: To introduce a brand-new online registration system
options.D: To explain how final grades will be calculated

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告核心是提醒春季选课截止日期以及相关的迟注册费、加退课等政策。B错误（wrong_purpose）：公告说热门课会很快满员，但并未宣布课程被取消。C错误（wrong_purpose）：公告未提及任何新的在线选课系统。D错误（wrong_purpose）：公告与期末成绩计算无关。

questions.stem: Why does the speaker advise students to join a waitlist?

options.A: Because waitlisted students receive a tuition discount
options.B: Because openings often appear during add/drop
options.C: Because waitlists guarantee a spot in any class
options.D: Because the add/drop period has been canceled

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。公告说"join the waitlist, since spots often open up during add/drop"，可推断建议候补是因为加退课期间常有名额空出。A错误（unrelated_inference）：没有任何证据表明候补学生能享学费折扣。C错误（over_inference）：公告只说常有名额空出，并未保证一定有位，属过度推断。D错误（wrong_detail）：公告明确说加退课期持续前两周，并未取消。

items.situation: undergraduate research symposium abstract submission deadline
items.announcement: Good morning, everyone. As department head, I want to remind all juniors and seniors about the Undergraduate Research Symposium this October. Abstracts of no more than 250 words are due to the symposium portal by 11:59 PM on Friday, September 13. Late submissions will not be reviewed. Please attach a one-page faculty endorsement letter; without it, your abstract will be returned. Travel funds are available for accepted presenters whose research involves off-campus fieldwork. If you are unsure whether your project qualifies, please email Dr. Kennedy in our office before the end of August.

questions.stem: What document must accompany each submitted abstract?

options.A: A signed travel-funds request form
options.B: A one-page faculty endorsement letter
options.C: A printed copy of the student's transcript
options.D: A research timeline covering the full semester

questions.explanation: 广播明确要求附一封一页的导师推荐信，否则摘要会被退回。B 正确。A 与广播将旅费视为后续福利相悖，topic_adjacent。C、D 没有提到，wrong_detail。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students whose research takes them off campus?

options.A: They will be excluded from the symposium for safety reasons
options.B: They must apply separately for travel insurance before submitting
options.C: They can only present posters and not give oral talks
options.D: They may be eligible for additional travel funding if their abstract is accepted

questions.explanation: 广播说被接收的、涉及校外田野工作的项目有旅费支持。D 正是合理推断。A 与广播鼓励参赛相反，reversed_intent。B 没提到保险，over_inference。C 没有区分海报和口头，wrong_detail。

items.situation: recreation center extending hours during finals week
items.announcement: Attention, students. The University Recreation Center will operate on extended hours during finals week, December 9 through December 15. The fitness floor and indoor track will be available from 5:00 AM until 1:00 AM the following morning. Group fitness classes, however, will run on a reduced schedule, with only morning yoga and evening cardio on offer. The climbing wall will close at 9:00 PM each evening for routine maintenance. Lockers will be cleared every night at midnight, so please remove your belongings before leaving the building. Regular hours resume Monday, December 16.

questions.stem: When will the climbing wall close during finals week?

options.A: At 5:00 AM each morning
options.B: At 1:00 PM each afternoon
options.C: At 9:00 PM each evening
options.D: At 1:00 AM the following morning

questions.explanation: 广播明说攀岩墙每晚 9 点关闭以做保养。C 正确。A、B、D 都是时间陷阱：5 AM 是健身楼层开放时间，1 AM 是健身楼层关闭时间，B 没出现。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who leave items in their lockers overnight?

options.A: Their belongings will be removed when the lockers are cleared at midnight
options.B: Their items will be safely stored for the entire finals week
options.C: Their lockers will be permanently reassigned to other members
options.D: Their access cards will be suspended until they retrieve their belongings

questions.explanation: 广播说储物柜每晚午夜清空，请离开前取走物品。A 是合理推断：留下的物品会被清空。B 与广播相反，reversed_intent。C 没有依据，over_inference。D 没出现，wrong_detail。

items.situation: annual outdoor movie night with blanket seating
items.announcement: Hi, everyone, this is Tara from the Student Activities Board. We're hosting our annual outdoor movie night next Friday, September 27, at Grover Field. The film will start at 8:30 PM, but please arrive by 8:00 to find a good spot. There is no chair seating; bring a blanket or a small ground mat. Free popcorn and lemonade will be served beside the projection booth. In case of rain, the event will move into Grover Hall, room 110, the following evening. We hope to see all of you under the stars.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of the announcement?

options.A: To remind students about safety rules for outdoor events on campus
options.B: To explain the Student Activities Board's budget for the year
options.C: To recruit volunteers for a new film studies club
options.D: To invite students to an outdoor movie night and explain seating and weather plans

questions.explanation: 广播主旨是邀请学生参加户外电影夜并说明座位和雨天安排。D 正确。A、B、C 都没出现，都是 wrong_topic 或 wrong_purpose。

questions.stem: What should students bring with them to the event?

options.A: A folding chair and an umbrella
options.B: A blanket or a small ground mat
options.C: A bottle of lemonade for themselves
options.D: A donation for the activities board

questions.explanation: 广播明说现场没有椅子，请自带毯子或小垫子。B 正确。A 与广播相反，reversed_intent。C、D 没提到，wrong_detail。

items.situation: industry professional speaking about career paths
items.announcement: Good morning, everyone. Next Tuesday at 4:00 PM in Tisch Hall room 220, our department will host a guest lecture by Mei Lin, a senior product manager at the engineering firm Halverson Dynamics. Ms. Lin will speak about realistic career paths for computer-science majors, including positions that do not require advanced degrees. The talk will be followed by a thirty-minute open question session. Please email Camila in our office by Friday if you plan to attend; we need a head count for refreshments. A short writing sample is not required, but recent graduates are encouraged to bring a copy of their resume.

questions.stem: What is the announcement mainly about?

options.A: An upcoming guest lecture on realistic career paths for computer-science majors
options.B: A required interview workshop for graduating seniors only
options.C: Changes to the graduate admission requirements at Halverson Dynamics
options.D: Funding opportunities for students who want to attend academic conferences

questions.explanation: 广播主旨是宣布关于计算机专业现实职业路径的客座讲座。A 正确。B、C、D 都没出现，都是 wrong_topic。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who plan to attend the talk?

options.A: They must wait outside the room until after Ms. Lin's introduction
options.B: They are required to submit a writing sample before the talk
options.C: They should email Camila by Friday so the office can plan refreshments
options.D: They will receive course credit for attending and asking questions

questions.explanation: 广播请有意参加的同学周五前发邮件给 Camila 以便统计茶点份数。C 正确。A 没提到，over_inference。B 与广播相反，reversed_intent。D 没出现，over_inference。

items.situation: interdisciplinary conference call for papers
items.announcement: Good afternoon, students. The Center for Interdisciplinary Studies is now accepting paper proposals for our spring symposium on Climate and Culture, scheduled for April 18 in Whitman Auditorium. We welcome submissions from any discipline, including arts, humanities, sciences, and policy. Abstracts should be 250 to 300 words and uploaded through the symposium portal by March 7 at 5:00 PM. Selected papers will receive a small travel stipend. Please note that proposals submitted by email will not be reviewed, so be sure to use the portal.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To remind students of an upcoming graduation rehearsal
options.B: To call for paper proposals for an interdisciplinary symposium
options.C: To explain a new requirement for graduate thesis submissions
options.D: To recruit volunteers for an arts and culture festival

questions.explanation: 公告核心是征集 symposium 论文提案，并说明提交方式和时限。其他选项与公告主题无关。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about proposals sent by email?

options.A: They will receive a delayed response from the committee.
options.B: They must be accompanied by an additional cover letter.
options.C: They will be forwarded to the symposium chair manually.
options.D: They will not be considered for the symposium.

questions.explanation: 公告明确说通过邮件提交的提案不会被审查，等于不会被考虑。其他选项与原文不符或无据。

items.situation: campus shuttle route change due to construction
items.announcement: Attention students, faculty, and staff. Due to ongoing repairs on Madison Drive, the Blue Line shuttle will operate on a modified route starting Monday, March 3. The shuttle will skip the Engineering stop entirely and instead run from the Library directly to Foster Hall. Service frequency will increase to every twelve minutes during peak hours to compensate. Riders heading to Engineering should board the Red Line at Foster Hall and transfer near the South Lot. The standard schedule will resume once paving is complete, which is expected around April 14.

questions.stem: What change will Blue Line riders experience during the modification?

options.A: Service will be suspended entirely on weekends.
options.B: Stops at Foster Hall will be temporarily eliminated.
options.C: The route will skip the Engineering stop entirely.
options.D: Riders must reserve seats through a mobile app.

questions.explanation: 公告明确说蓝线将跳过 Engineering 站。其他选项要么与事实相反，要么是无关行为。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about Engineering-bound riders?

options.A: They will need to make a transfer to reach their destination.
options.B: They will receive a free monthly transit pass during repairs.
options.C: They will travel faster than they did under the standard schedule.
options.D: They will not be able to reach Engineering until April 14.

questions.explanation: 公告说前往 Engineering 的乘客需在 Foster Hall 上红线并在 South Lot 换乘，即需要换乘。其他选项缺乏依据或与原文相反。

items.situation: campus dining hall switching to summer hours
items.announcement: Attention students. Starting Monday, May 19, the Hartwood Dining Hall will switch to its summer schedule. Breakfast will continue from 8:00 to 10:30 AM, but lunch service ends at 1:30 instead of 2:00, and dinner will run from 5:30 to 7:30 only. The grab-and-go bar at the south entrance will remain open until 9:00 PM for late evening snacks. Please bring your campus ID for the grab-and-go scanner. Summer meal-plan refunds for unused balances over fifteen dollars will be processed automatically at the end of the term.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To inform students of new summer dining hours
options.B: To explain a recent change in meal-plan prices
options.C: To recruit student workers for the dining hall
options.D: To advertise a new grab-and-go menu of items

questions.explanation: 公告核心是告知夏季就餐时间和相关安排。其他选项偏离主题。

questions.stem: Until what time does the grab-and-go bar remain open?

options.A: Until 7:30 PM
options.B: Until 8:00 PM
options.C: Until 9:00 PM
options.D: Until 10:30 PM

questions.explanation: 公告说南门 grab-and-go bar 营业到晚上 9:00。其他时间与公告中其他细节相关或不符。

items.situation: student art market in the quad
items.announcement: Attention students. The Spring Art Market will return to Wexler Quad this Friday from 11:00 AM to 4:00 PM. Over forty student artists will be selling original prints, ceramics, jewelry, and zines, with most items priced between five and twenty-five dollars. Cash and mobile payments are accepted at every booth. Bring a reusable bag if you can; the club is reducing single-use plastic this year. Sign-ups for next semester's market booth slots will also be available at the volunteer table.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To promote a student-run art market on campus
options.B: To advertise paid internships at a campus art club
options.C: To announce a fundraiser for the ceramics program
options.D: To remind students about a printmaking competition

questions.explanation: 公告核心是宣传周五在 Wexler Quad 举办的学生艺术市集。其他选项均不是公告内容。

questions.stem: What does the speaker ask attendees to bring if possible?

options.A: An updated student ID card
options.B: A printout of the artist directory
options.C: A reusable shopping bag
options.D: A signed plastic waste pledge

questions.explanation: 公告明确说带可重复使用的购物袋以减少一次性塑料。其他选项与公告不符。

items.situation: new fitness equipment installation at recreation center
items.announcement: Good afternoon, members of the campus community. The Recreation Center will install a new set of cardio and strength equipment between June second and June ninth. During this period, the second-floor fitness room will be entirely closed for safety reasons. The first-floor gym, swimming pool, and squash courts will remain open during normal hours. Members holding annual passes may use the partner gym at Hadley Recreation free of charge during the closure by showing their membership card at the front desk. Once the installation is complete, an orientation session for the new machines will be offered on June tenth at five o'clock in the lobby.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To recruit new members for the campus recreation center program
options.B: To inform users about a temporary closure for new equipment installation
options.C: To explain why the annual membership fee has recently increased
options.D: To advertise a partnership with another recreation facility nearby

questions.explanation: 通告主要告知成员设备更新带来的临时关闭，B 正确。A 偏离主旨；C 与通告无关；D 把附带福利当成主旨。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about annual pass holders during the closure period?

options.A: They will receive a partial refund automatically applied to their accounts
options.B: They are encouraged to skip exercise for that week to avoid injuries
options.C: They will have to attend the orientation session before June tenth
options.D: They can continue exercising at no extra cost using Hadley Recreation

questions.explanation: 通告说年卡持有人可免费使用 Hadley，故推断他们可以照常锻炼且不需额外付费，D 正确。A 无依据；B 与通告精神相反；C 把日期弄反。

items.situation: campus shuttle route change due to construction
items.announcement: Good morning, riders. Beginning Monday, the campus shuttle's evening route will be temporarily modified because of construction on Maple Avenue. The shuttle will no longer stop at the Maple and Fifth crossing, and the South Quad stop will be moved one block east. Service to the medical center and the off-campus apartments will continue without change. Buses will run every twenty minutes between six o'clock in the evening and midnight. Riders are encouraged to check the transit app for live updates, and additional staff will be at the main stop on Monday evening to answer questions about the new route.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain a recent fare increase on the evening shuttle service
options.B: To recruit student riders to help survey other commuters
options.C: To announce that the shuttle will stop running entirely next week
options.D: To inform riders of a temporary route change caused by construction

questions.explanation: 通告主要说明因施工而临时调整路线，D 正确。A 与通告无关；B 与通告无关；C 把临时改道夸大为停运。

questions.stem: According to the announcement, what is changing about the South Quad stop?

options.A: The stop will be eliminated entirely from the evening route
options.B: The stop will be relocated one block east during construction
options.C: The stop will be served only on weekdays for the next month
options.D: The stop will be moved to a different building's lobby entrance

questions.explanation: 通告明确说南广场站点东移一个街区，B 正确。A 把改动夸大为取消；C 与通告无关；D 与通告无关。

items.situation: industry professional speaking about career paths
items.announcement: Hello, students. The Career Development Office is delighted to host Ms. Carla Brennan, senior product manager at a major technology firm, for an evening talk on career paths in the technology sector. The event will take place Wednesday at six-thirty in Holloway Auditorium. Ms. Brennan will discuss how she transitioned from a biology background into product management and will offer practical advice for students considering similar shifts. A brief question-and-answer period will follow the talk, and copies of her recent book will be available for purchase at the entrance. Light snacks will be provided, and seating is on a first-come basis.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce an evening talk by a guest speaker on technology careers
options.B: To promote the sale of Ms. Brennan's recently published book
options.C: To advertise the Career Development Office's spring internship program
options.D: To request student volunteers to help organize the auditorium event

questions.explanation: 通告主要宣布关于职业道路的讲座，A 正确。B 是附带细节；C 与通告无关；D 与通告无关。

questions.stem: According to the announcement, what topic will Ms. Brennan focus on?

options.A: Advanced research methods used in modern biology laboratories
options.B: Investment opportunities in early-stage technology startups
options.C: Her shift from biology into product management work
options.D: Strategies for negotiating starting salaries in technology firms

questions.explanation: 通告说她会谈从生物学背景到产品经理的转型，C 正确。A 把背景错放为主题；B 与通告无关；D 与通告无关。

items.situation: campus bookstore moving to a new building
items.announcement: Attention students, faculty, and staff. The campus bookstore will be moving from its current location in Henderson Hall to the renovated ground floor of the Student Union starting Monday, October 14th. The new space is larger and will include a dedicated study lounge and a small coffee bar. During the move, the bookstore will be closed from Thursday afternoon through Sunday evening. You can still order textbooks online during that period, and we'll hold any pickups until the new store reopens. Please stop by the Student Union next Monday morning to check out the new space.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: Encourage students to order more textbooks online
options.B: Apologize for delays in textbook deliveries this term
options.C: Inform the campus that the bookstore is relocating
options.D: Announce a permanent closure of Henderson Hall

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C，因为通知的核心信息是书店从 Henderson Hall 搬到学生中心。A 错在线上订购只是搬迁期间的临时安排，并非通知的主要目的，属于 too_narrow。B 错在公告完全没有对延迟交付道歉，属于 wrong_purpose。D 错在公告只说书店搬走，并没有说整个 Henderson Hall 永久关闭，属于 over_inference。

questions.stem: What will the new bookstore location include?

options.A: A study lounge and a coffee bar
options.B: A printing center for course materials
options.C: An expanded faculty office area
options.D: A 24-hour textbook pickup locker

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A，因为公告明确说新店面包含一个专门的自习休息区和一个小咖啡吧。B 错在公告并未提到打印中心，属于 related_but_not_stated。C 错在公告只字未提教师办公区域，属于 related_but_not_stated。D 错在公告说搬迁期间会保留取书订单，并未提到 24 小时自助取书柜，属于 wrong_detail。

items.situation: temporary road closure and detour instructions
items.announcement: Due to scheduled utility work, Maple Avenue between the library and the science quad will be closed to vehicles from 6 a.m. Tuesday until 8 p.m. Thursday. Drivers should use Elm Street as a marked detour, which adds about five minutes to most campus routes. Pedestrians and cyclists may still pass through using the sidewalk on the north side, though we ask that you slow down near the work zone. Shuttle service will continue, but the East Loop bus will skip the library stop and pick up at the Student Union instead. Please plan a few extra minutes into your commute.

questions.stem: What change will affect the East Loop shuttle service?

options.A: It will skip the library stop and use the Student Union instead
options.B: It will be canceled entirely for the rest of the week
options.C: It will start running every five minutes during the closure
options.D: It will reroute to Elm Street and add two extra stops

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A，因为公告说东环巴士会跳过图书馆站，改在学生中心上下客。B 错在公告说班车继续运行，并未取消，属于 wrong_detail（与事实相反）。C 错在公告并未提及任何加密班次的信息，属于 related_but_not_stated。D 错在 Elm Street 是车辆的绕行路线，并非班车的新路线，属于 misattributed_detail。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about pedestrians during the closure?

options.A: They are required to use the Elm Street detour as well
options.B: They will be charged a small fee to cross the work area
options.C: They can still walk through but should move carefully
options.D: They must show their student ID at a checkpoint

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C，因为公告说行人和骑行者仍可通过北侧人行道，但要在施工区附近放慢速度，可推断他们仍可通行但需小心。A 错在 Elm Street 是车辆的绕行路线，并非行人必须走的，属于 misattributed_detail。B 错在公告完全没有提及任何费用，属于 unrelated_inference。D 错在公告没有提到任何身份验证或检查点，属于 over_inference。

items.situation: temporary closure of main library reading room
items.announcement: Good morning, students and faculty. Due to scheduled HVAC repairs, the main reading room on the second floor of the central library will be closed from Monday, October 21, through Friday, October 25. During this period, all study materials and individual desks will be relocated to the basement reference area and the third-floor seminar room. The reference librarians will be stationed at the help desk near the basement entrance throughout the week. Please remember that the noise-control rules of the original reading room will continue to apply in the temporary spaces. Thank you for your cooperation during this brief disruption.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: Announce a permanent relocation of the library reading room
options.B: Inform listeners about a temporary closure and alternate study spaces
options.C: Recruit volunteers to assist with HVAC repair work
options.D: Promote the new third-floor seminar room as a study space

questions.explanation: 公告主要通知阅览室短暂关闭并指向替代空间。A 与公告强调'短期'相反，C/D 都是无关或片面。

questions.stem: Where will reference librarians be stationed during the closure?

options.A: At the original reading room entrance
options.B: At the help desk near the basement entrance
options.C: In a temporary booth on the third floor
options.D: At the building's main lobby information counter

questions.explanation: 公告说咨询员设在地下室入口的咨询台。其他都是错误地点。

items.situation: volunteers needed for community service trip
items.announcement: Attention students. The Riverside Service Club is looking for fifteen volunteers to help with our annual winter trip to the Greenwood Food Bank on Saturday, December 7. We will be sorting donated goods, organizing the shelves, and preparing meal packages from 9:00 AM until 2:00 PM. Transportation will be provided from the south parking lot, and lunch will be served on site. While we provide gloves and aprons, please wear closed-toe shoes and clothes you don't mind getting dirty. No prior experience is needed. Sign up on the club's bulletin board outside Hayes Hall by Wednesday so we can confirm the bus headcount.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: Announce the opening of a new food bank in Greenwood
options.B: Recruit volunteers for a service trip to the food bank
options.C: Apologize for canceling last year's winter service trip
options.D: Promote a new transportation program from the south parking lot

questions.explanation: 公告核心是招募食物银行志愿者。其他都是无关或表面词陷阱。

questions.stem: What are volunteers asked to wear?

options.A: Formal business attire
options.B: Club uniform shirts only
options.C: Closed-toe shoes and old clothes
options.D: Gloves brought from home

questions.explanation: 公告要求穿闭口鞋和不怕脏的衣服。手套和围裙由俱乐部提供。

items.situation: first-year orientation overview for transfer students
items.announcement: Welcome, transfer students. Our orientation week begins on Monday, August 26, and runs through Friday, August 30. You are required to attend the academic advising session on Tuesday at 10:00 AM in Whitman Auditorium and the residence hall meeting on Wednesday evening. Other activities, such as the campus tour and the student organization fair, are optional but strongly recommended. Your orientation packet, which includes your meal card and parking sticker, can be picked up from the Transfer Office in Room 215 of Bryant Hall between 9:00 AM and 4:00 PM. Please bring photo identification when collecting your packet.

questions.stem: What is the announcement primarily about?

options.A: Why transfer students need separate orientation events
options.B: How to apply for the transfer student program next year
options.C: When the campus tour and student organization fair occur
options.D: What transfer students need to know about orientation week

questions.explanation: 公告综合介绍了迎新周的安排，主旨是让转学生了解相关信息。其他都是片面或不相关。

questions.stem: What must students bring to pick up their orientation packet?

options.A: Their tuition payment receipt
options.B: Their photo identification
options.C: Their previous transcript
options.D: A signed academic advising form

questions.explanation: 公告明说要带照片身份证件。其他都是无关或错误细节。

items.situation: health insurance enrollment information session
items.announcement: Welcome, everyone. This information session walks you through health insurance enrollment for the spring semester. Domestic students are auto-renewed in the basic campus plan unless you opt out by January 18 through the student portal. International students must select either the standard or the comprehensive plan during the same window; the comprehensive plan adds dental and vision coverage for a flat fee of $185. Forms submitted after January 18 will only be processed for the following semester. Please bring your enrollment confirmation to the Student Health Center on the first day you need care.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain how students enroll in health insurance for spring
options.B: To advertise a new dental coverage package
options.C: To remind students about the Student Health Center hours
options.D: To announce a new flat fee for all health plans

questions.explanation: 讲话核心介绍春季 health insurance 的注册流程。A 正确。B 只是细节；C 偏题；D 与原话不符 ($185 只针对 comprehensive plan)。

questions.stem: What must international students do before January 18?

options.A: Pay their tuition balance for the spring semester
options.B: Bring an enrollment confirmation to the Student Health Center
options.C: Select either the standard or the comprehensive plan
options.D: Opt out of the basic campus plan through the portal

questions.explanation: 公告说国际生必须在 1 月 18 日前在 standard 与 comprehensive 之间二选一。C 正确。A 完全没提；B 是看病第一天才做；D 是 domestic 学生的操作。

items.situation: new fitness equipment installation at recreation center
items.announcement: Attention recreation center members: starting Monday, March 9, we'll be installing four new strength training machines in the upper gym. Hours for the upper gym will be limited to 6 to 10 a.m. and 4 to 9 p.m. throughout that week so contractors can finish safely. The lower gym, the cardio room, and the climbing wall remain open during normal hours. Members with personal training appointments in the upper gym will be moved to the lower gym automatically. You'll receive a text confirming the new room number by Friday evening. The new machines require a brief safety orientation; sign-up opens March 16.

questions.stem: What are the limited hours for the upper gym during installation week?

options.A: From 10 a.m. to 4 p.m. each day
options.B: From 6 to 10 a.m. and 4 to 9 p.m.
options.C: From 9 a.m. to 9 p.m. throughout the week
options.D: Closed completely for the full week

questions.explanation: 公告原话: Hours for the upper gym will be limited to 6 to 10 a.m. and 4 to 9 p.m.。B 正确。A 把开放时段反过来；C 编造一个全天连贯时段；D 与 "hours are limited" 矛盾。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about members with personal training appointments in the upper gym?

options.A: They will need to cancel and rebook their sessions themselves
options.B: They will receive a partial refund for the affected week
options.C: They are required to attend the safety orientation in advance
options.D: They do not need to contact staff to be reassigned a room

questions.explanation: 公告说 will be moved to the lower gym automatically，且会主动短信确认。D 正确。A、B 都未提及；C 是新机器才需要 orientation，与训练课改地点无关。

items.situation: LinkedIn profile photo day at career center
items.announcement: Hi everyone, the career center is hosting LinkedIn profile photo day this Thursday, March 13, from 11 a.m. to 4 p.m. in the Atwood Conference Room. There's no charge for current students. Please come dressed in business or business-casual attire — we recommend solid colors and avoiding busy patterns, which can look distracting in a small photo. Walk-ins are welcome, but the line tends to get long after lunch, so we'd suggest signing up for a 10-minute slot through the career portal. You'll receive two edited photos by email within five business days of your session.

questions.stem: When is LinkedIn profile photo day scheduled?

options.A: On Tuesday from 11 a.m. to 4 p.m.
options.B: On Thursday from 9 a.m. to noon
options.C: On Thursday, March 13, from 11 a.m. to 4 p.m.
options.D: On Thursday afternoon by appointment only

questions.explanation: 原话: this Thursday, March 13, from 11 a.m. to 4 p.m。C 正确。A 改了星期；B 改了时段；D 限制方式不对，公告说欢迎 walk-in。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who arrive after lunch as walk-ins?

options.A: They are likely to face a longer wait time
options.B: They will not be photographed that day at all
options.C: They will be charged a small late fee for the slot
options.D: They should bring a printed resume to the session

questions.explanation: 公告说 walk-ins 可以，但午餐后排队会变长，因此走读者下午到会等更久。A 正确。B 夸大；C、D 都是无关或编造内容。

items.situation: student lounge or study area closing for pipe/ceiling repair
items.announcement: Quick announcement for everyone studying in the Drake Hall second-floor lounge: the room will be closed from Wednesday, April 8, through Friday, April 10, while plumbers replace a leaking pipe above the ceiling. The chairs and tables will be moved out by Tuesday evening. During the closure, please use the first-floor commons or the connected Library Annex, both of which extend their hours until midnight that week. If you left a personal item in the lounge — books, a sweater, anything in the cubbies — pick it up by 5 p.m. Tuesday or it'll be moved to lost and found.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To inform students about new furniture for the lounge
options.B: To recommend the Library Annex as a quiet study spot
options.C: To warn students about overnight construction noise
options.D: To explain a temporary closure of the second-floor lounge

questions.explanation: 公告核心通知二楼休息室因修管道短期关闭。D 正确。A 偏题；B 只是替代地点提示；C 内容偏离（公告没强调噪音）。

questions.stem: By when must students retrieve their personal items from the lounge?

options.A: By midnight on Wednesday, April 8
options.B: By 5 p.m. on Tuesday
options.C: Before the plumbers begin work on April 8
options.D: By the end of the day on April 10

questions.explanation: 公告原话: pick it up by 5 p.m. Tuesday。B 正确。A、D 都是用了公告中真实日期错配；C 表面合理但具体时间不准确。

items.situation: mock interview sessions with alumni volunteers
items.announcement: Welcome to the mock interview program. This semester, alumni from finance, public health, and design firms will conduct one-on-one practice interviews during the first three Fridays of November. Each session lasts forty-five minutes: thirty minutes for the interview itself and fifteen for tailored feedback. To register, log into the career portal by October 25 and rank your top three industries; we'll match you with an alumnus based on availability and your stated career interests. Once matched, you'll receive a confirmation containing the alumnus's bio, suggested prep questions, and a virtual meeting link. The program is most useful for students who arrive with specific learning goals.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain how mock interview sessions with alumni are structured and scheduled
options.B: To advertise career options in finance and public health
options.C: To recruit current alumni as new volunteers for the program
options.D: To announce a new virtual meeting platform used for interviews

questions.explanation: 公告系统介绍 mock interview 流程、报名步骤与时间表。A 正确。B 只是举例的领域；C 完全反向；D 是细节而非主题。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who do not rank their industries by October 25?

options.A: They will be assigned to a generalist alumnus for the session
options.B: They will be charged a late registration fee for November
options.C: They will not be matched for a November session
options.D: They can attend a walk-in slot during the second Friday

questions.explanation: 公告说在 10 月 25 日前排序行业才会被匹配，因此晚交的人不会被分配。C 正确。A 是过度推论；B、D 都是公告未提的内容。

items.situation: undergraduate research symposium abstract submission deadline
items.announcement: Good afternoon. I'm reminding all undergraduate researchers that abstracts for the spring research symposium are due by Friday, March 14 at 11:59 PM. Each abstract should be no longer than 250 words and must be submitted through the symposium portal, not by email. Faculty mentors must sign off electronically before submission. Accepted presenters will be notified by March 28. The symposium itself runs April 22 and 23 in the science quad. Please reach out to the symposium committee if you have questions about format or eligibility.

questions.stem: How must abstracts be submitted?

options.A: By email to the symposium committee
options.B: Through the official symposium portal
options.C: On printed forms turned in at the department
options.D: By upload through each faculty mentor's account

questions.explanation: 讲话明确说必须通过symposium portal提交，且不通过邮件。其他三个方式都被排除或未提。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the role of faculty mentors?

options.A: Mentors choose the order of all student presentations
options.B: Mentors join the symposium committee for that year
options.C: Mentors organize travel reimbursement for presenters
options.D: Mentors must approve student abstracts before submission

questions.explanation: 讲话说导师必须在提交前电子签字，意味着导师在提交前要审核认可。其他选项无依据。

items.situation: LinkedIn profile photo day at career center
items.announcement: Hello, everyone. The Career Services Office will host a complimentary LinkedIn profile photo session on Wednesday, March 19, from 10:00 AM to 3:00 PM in Robinson Hall. Sessions are by appointment only and will be booked in fifteen-minute slots. A professional photographer will be on site. Please dress in business attire and bring a fully charged phone with the LinkedIn app already installed. Sign-ups open through the career portal on Friday at 9:00 AM, and slots typically fill within hours. Walk-ins cannot be accommodated this year due to time constraints. Contact us at careers@university.edu with questions.

questions.stem: What item are students instructed to bring with them?

options.A: A printed copy of their current resume
options.B: A USB drive for receiving photo files
options.C: A fully charged phone with the LinkedIn app installed
options.D: A signed permission form from a faculty advisor

questions.explanation: 讲话明确要求带充满电的手机并预装LinkedIn应用。其他选项无依据。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who do not sign up by Friday morning?

options.A: They are unlikely to secure a session before slots fill
options.B: They will receive automatic priority on the next event
options.C: They will need to pay an additional fee for a photo
options.D: They can simply walk in if they arrive before 10:00 AM

questions.explanation: 讲话说名额通常几小时内就被订满，因此不在开放时段尽早报名的学生很可能抢不到。B、C、D无依据；D尤其被"walk-ins cannot be accommodated"明确排除。

items.situation: new fitness equipment installation at recreation center
items.announcement: Attention recreation center members. New cardiovascular equipment will be installed in the main fitness room over spring break, from March 11 through March 18. The fitness room will remain closed during this period, but the weight room and swimming pool will remain open on normal hours. Installation includes ten new treadmills, six rowing machines, and four stationary bikes, all replacing units that have reached the end of their service life. Members are welcome to attend a brief demonstration of the new equipment on March 19 at 4:00 PM in the lobby.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of the announcement?

options.A: To recruit volunteers to help install new equipment
options.B: To request feedback about treadmill brands for the future
options.C: To explain new safety procedures during equipment use
options.D: To inform members about new fitness equipment and the related closure

questions.explanation: 讲话目的是告知会员新设备安装计划及健身房临时关闭。A、B、C都不在讲话中。

questions.stem: Which facilities will remain open during the installation week?

options.A: Only the main fitness room
options.B: The weight room and the swimming pool
options.C: Only the swimming pool on weekends
options.D: All facilities except the swimming pool

questions.explanation: 讲话明确说健身房关闭，但举重房和泳池正常开放。其他选项颠倒或不准确。

items.situation: new bike-share station locations
items.announcement: Good morning. Transportation Services is pleased to announce four new bike-share stations opening campus-wide on Monday, April 7. New stations will be located outside Bryson Library, near the south entrance of the Student Union, behind the Lopez Athletic Complex, and at the visitor lot off Maple Avenue. Each station holds twelve bikes, including two adaptive models for riders who need them. All stations will support the existing campus mobility app, and the first thirty minutes of any ride remain free for students with a valid identification card. We hope these additions will make crossing campus faster, especially during peak class times.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of the announcement?

options.A: To announce the opening of four new bike-share stations on campus
options.B: To explain how to repair adaptive bikes in the existing network
options.C: To recruit student volunteers for spring traffic surveys
options.D: To warn that the campus mobility app will be discontinued

questions.explanation: 讲话核心是介绍四个新bike-share站点的开放。B、C、D都与讲话无关。

questions.stem: How many bikes will each new station hold?

options.A: Eight bikes including adaptive models
options.B: Ten bikes for student use only
options.C: Twelve bikes including two adaptive models
options.D: Fifteen bikes restricted to campus staff

questions.explanation: 讲话明确每站12辆，包括2辆适配型。其他都是混淆的数字。

items.situation: campus shuttle route change due to construction
items.announcement: Attention students. Due to construction along Birch Avenue, the West Campus shuttle route will be temporarily rerouted starting this Monday at 6:00 a.m. Buses will skip the Birch Avenue and Library Plaza stops and instead detour through Maple Lane, with new pickup points behind Maxwell Hall and outside the recreation center. We'll add an extra bus during the 8 a.m. to 10 a.m. window to handle the additional foot traffic. Please check the transit app for live arrival times before heading out. The original route is expected to resume on April 14, weather permitting.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To inform students about a temporary change to a shuttle route.
options.B: To advertise a new transit app being launched on campus.
options.C: To explain why Birch Avenue will be permanently closed.
options.D: To recruit student volunteers for transit assistance positions.

questions.explanation: 公告中心是说明因施工临时更改班车路线。B、C、D偏离主题。

questions.stem: According to the announcement, where will the new pickup points be located?

options.A: On Birch Avenue and inside Library Plaza.
options.B: Inside Maxwell Hall and the recreation center lobby.
options.C: Behind Maxwell Hall and outside the recreation center.
options.D: On Maple Lane next to the football stadium.

questions.explanation: 公告明确说新停靠点设在Maxwell Hall后面和娱乐中心外。A是被绕过的站点；B、D不符合公告描述。

items.situation: cultural food festival organized by international club
items.announcement: Good afternoon, everyone. The International Students' Association is excited to announce our annual Cultural Food Festival, which we'll hold this Saturday from noon to 4 p.m. in Hartwell Plaza. Over twenty student groups will set up tasting stations representing cuisines from across five continents. Tickets are five dollars at the door and include a tasting passport. We're also accepting last-minute student volunteers — sign up through the club's website by Thursday evening. Proceeds this year support a community partnership with the downtown food pantry, so every ticket purchased helps fund free meals across the city.

questions.stem: What is the announcement primarily about?

options.A: A new community partnership with the downtown food pantry.
options.B: An upcoming cultural food festival organized by a student group.
options.C: The launch of a new volunteer recruitment portal on campus.
options.D: A change to weekend lunch hours at the campus dining hall.

questions.explanation: 公告主要介绍国际学生协会即将举办的文化美食节。A、C、D是次要信息或偏离主题。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who buy tickets to the festival?

options.A: They will receive a refund if they cannot attend.
options.B: They are required to volunteer at least one hour.
options.C: They must reserve a spot at each station in advance.
options.D: They will help fund free meals through the food pantry.

questions.explanation: 公告明确说门票收入支持社区食品仓库的免费餐食项目。A、B、C都缺乏依据。

items.situation: financial aid office workshop on scholarship applications
items.announcement: Good morning, students. The Financial Aid Office will be hosting a free scholarship application workshop next Tuesday at 4:00 p.m. in Briggs Hall, Room 215. The session is led by counselor Linda Park and walks through the most common errors that delay or disqualify student submissions. You'll learn how to draft a strong personal statement, request recommendation letters effectively, and pull together your financial documents. Please bring a laptop and a draft of any essay you're already working on. Sign up on the financial aid portal by Monday evening — we can take about thirty students per session.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain new eligibility rules for university scholarships.
options.B: To recruit volunteers to staff the financial aid office.
options.C: To remind students of the financial aid application deadline.
options.D: To promote a workshop that helps students apply for scholarships.

questions.explanation: 公告主要是宣传一个奖学金申请研讨会。其他选项偏离主旨。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who want to attend the workshop?

options.A: They must already have submitted their applications.
options.B: They should sign up early because space is limited.
options.C: They need to bring a printed recommendation letter.
options.D: They are not eligible if they are first-year students.

questions.explanation: 公告说每场可容纳约30人，并要求在周一晚之前报名，暗示名额有限要尽早报名。其他选项与公告不符。

items.situation: schedule announcement for honors society senior thesis defenses
items.announcement: Hello, society members. As president of the Honors Society, I'm writing to share the schedule for this semester's senior thesis defenses. Eight seniors will present their original research to the faculty committee between April 15 and April 19 in the Whittaker Building. Each defense begins at 2 PM and runs about ninety minutes, with the first thirty minutes reserved for the student's presentation and the remainder for committee questions. Defenses are open to the public, and society members are especially encouraged to attend in support of our seniors. The full schedule of dates and topics will be posted outside the dean's office by Friday.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To request that members volunteer at the thesis defenses
options.B: To explain how to write a successful honors thesis
options.C: To inform members of the upcoming defense schedule
options.D: To collect feedback on last semester's defenses

questions.explanation: 通告核心是分享本学期八位senior答辩的日程，并鼓励到场支持，主旨即告知答辩安排。A、B、D均与实际内容不符。

questions.stem: Where will the defenses take place?

options.A: The Whittaker Building
options.B: The dean's office
options.C: The library auditorium
options.D: The Honors Society lounge

questions.explanation: 通告明确说'in the Whittaker Building'，即Whittaker楼。B是张贴日程表的位置而非答辩地点；C、D均未被提到。

items.situation: spring symposium with limited seats and coursework prerequisites
items.announcement: Good morning, undergraduates. The Sociology Department is pleased to announce its annual Spring Symposium on Urban Inequality, scheduled for March 22 in Carlton Hall. Six visiting scholars will present new research in three back-to-back panels from 9 AM to 4 PM. Because seating is limited to seventy attendees, students must register through the department portal by March 8 to be considered. Priority will be given to students who have completed at least one upper-level sociology course or who can provide a brief statement of relevant research interest. Selected students will be notified by email no later than March 12.

questions.stem: How will students be selected for attendance?

options.A: By a first-come, first-served registration system
options.B: By professor nomination from each sociology course
options.C: By payment of a registration fee before the deadline
options.D: By prior coursework or a statement of research interest

questions.explanation: 通告说优先权给予已修过upper-level社会学课程或能提供research interest声明的学生。A与'limited seats + selected'选拔机制不符；B、C均无依据。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who register before the deadline?

options.A: They will receive priority over upper-level sociology majors
options.B: They are not guaranteed a seat even after registering
options.C: They will be required to present their own research
options.D: They must attend all three panels to receive credit

questions.explanation: 由于座位仅七十个且需要'be considered'后由部门'selected'，可推断注册不等于一定入选。A与通告中优先标准相反；C、D均无依据。

items.situation: financial aid office workshop on Whitfield and Brookhaven scholarship applications
items.announcement: Attention juniors and seniors. The Financial Aid Office will host a scholarship application workshop on Thursday, November 9, at 5:30 PM in Brewster Lounge, Room 110. Senior advisor Mr. Tanaka will walk students through the application timeline for the Whitfield Foundation and Brookhaven Trust scholarships, both of which open for submissions on December 1. Attendees should bring a current resume and an unofficial transcript. Students are encouraged to draft personal statements ahead of the workshop, as Mr. Tanaka will offer individual feedback during the final thirty minutes. Both scholarships require academic transcripts and a faculty recommendation that must reach the office by January 15.

questions.stem: What should attendees bring to the workshop?

options.A: A current resume and an unofficial transcript
options.B: A printed copy of last semester's grade report
options.C: A signed faculty recommendation letter
options.D: A draft of the personal statement only

questions.explanation: 通告明确说'bring a current resume and an unofficial transcript'。B、C都不在bring范围；D不完整——通告说鼓励但未要求带，且工作人员要求的是简历+成绩单。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who skip drafting a personal statement?

options.A: They will be ineligible to apply for the scholarships
options.B: They will be required to submit their application later
options.C: They will miss out on the individual feedback session
options.D: They will need to attend a follow-up workshop in December

questions.explanation: 通告说Mr. Tanaka在最后30分钟给personal statement提供个别反馈，可推断没准备草稿的学生将错过个别反馈。A过度推断；B无依据；D无相关信息。

items.situation: renowned scientist giving a guest lecture on campus
items.announcement: I'm excited to announce that Dr. Elena Torres, a leading climate scientist from Stanford University, will deliver a guest lecture this Thursday at 3 p.m. in Waldman Auditorium. Her talk is titled 'The Future of Our Planet: Climate Solutions for the Next Decade.' This event is free and open to all students and faculty. However, seats are limited, so we encourage you to arrive early. Please bring your student ID for entry. A brief Q&A session will follow the lecture.

questions.stem: What is the primary purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To advertise a new climate research project
options.B: To announce a guest lecture by a climate scientist
options.C: To require students to attend a lecture
options.D: To discuss the effects of climate change

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。公告的主要目的是宣布一位著名气候科学家将举办客座讲座。A选项错误，公告没有提到任何研究项目。C选项错误，公告是鼓励参加，而非强制要求。D选项错误，讲座内容涉及气候变化解决方案，但公告本身不是讨论气候变化。

questions.stem: What are attendees advised to do?

options.A: Register for the lecture online
options.B: Read the speaker's book beforehand
options.C: Bring a notebook for notes
options.D: Arrive early because seats are limited

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。公告提到座位有限，建议尽早到达。A选项是相关但未提及的，公告没有要求在线注册。B选项是错误细节，公告没有要求提前阅读。C选项是相关但未提及的，公告没有提到笔记本。

items.situation: campus dining hall switching to summer hours
items.announcement: Due to the upcoming summer break, the Main Street Dining Hall will transition to summer hours starting next Monday, June 5th. The dining hall will be open from 7:30 a.m. to 7:00 p.m., Monday through Friday, and will be closed on weekends. Breakfast and lunch will be served as usual, but dinner service will end at 6:30 p.m. Please note that meal swipes will still be accepted during all operating hours. We appreciate your understanding as we adjust our schedule for the summer.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce a new menu at the dining hall
options.B: To inform about a temporary closure for renovations
options.C: To notify students about changes to dining hours
options.D: To remind students to use meal swipes

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。公告的核心是通知学生食堂将切换到夏季营业时间。A选项错误，公告没有提到新菜单。B选项错误，公告说的是时间调整，而非关闭装修。D选项太狭窄，使用餐券只是公告中提到的一个细节，不是主要目的。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the dining hall's current hours?

options.A: They are likely longer than the summer hours
options.B: They include weekend service
options.C: They start earlier than 7:30 a.m.
options.D: They end after 7:00 p.m.

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告提到夏季时间从7:30到19:00，周末关闭，暗示当前时间可能更长（比如更晚关门或周末开放）。B选项是字面复述，从公告可推断夏季周末关闭，但当前时间可能包括周末，但B选项直接陈述当前时间包括周末服务，这并非直接推断。A更合理：夏季时间缩短，因此当前时间更长。C选项过度推断，无法推断当前开始时间是否更早。D选项可能正确，但A更明确，因为公告提到夏季时间结束于19:00，暗示当前可能更晚。

items.situation: spring academic symposium with limited seats and prerequisites
items.announcement: We're pleased to announce that the Spring Academic Symposium will take place on April 20th in the Student Union Ballroom. This year's theme is 'Innovations in Interdisciplinary Research.' Due to high demand, attendance is limited to the first 200 students who register. To be eligible, you must have a minimum GPA of 3.5 and submit a brief statement of interest by March 1st. Registration opens next Monday at 9 a.m. on the symposium website. Successful applicants will be notified by email.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce the theme of the symposium
options.B: To remind students about the deadline
options.C: To explain the registration process
options.D: To announce the symposium and its eligibility requirements

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。公告的主要目的是宣布研讨会及其资格要求（GPA、兴趣陈述）。A选项太狭窄，主题只是公告的一部分。B选项太狭窄，截止日期只是细节。C选项虽然涉及注册流程，但公告还包括资格要求和日期等，D更全面地概括了公告目的。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the symposium?

options.A: It is open to all students regardless of GPA
options.B: It is likely to be very competitive to attend
options.C: It will feature only one speaker
options.D: It is free for all registered students

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。公告提到名额有限（前200名），且有GPA要求，表明竞争激烈。A选项错误，公告明确要求GPA 3.5以上。C选项过度推断，公告未提及演讲者数量。D选项过度推断，公告未提及费用。

items.situation: new fitness equipment installation at recreation center
items.announcement: Attention students and faculty. New cardiovascular equipment will be installed at the Crawford Recreation Center beginning Monday, May 4. As a result, the cardio room on the second floor will be temporarily closed from May 4 through May 8, and the rowing machines will not be available during this period. Members can still use the weight floor, the indoor track, and the lap pool throughout the week. Please be aware that the staff will offer two demonstration sessions of the new machines on Saturday, May 9, at 10 a.m. and 2 p.m. Pre-registration through the rec center app is encouraged but not required.

questions.stem: What will be unavailable during the installation period?

options.A: Both the weight floor and the indoor track
options.B: The second-floor cardio room and rowing machines
options.C: The indoor swimming pool for several days
options.D: The locker room facilities in the basement

questions.explanation: 通告明确指出二楼cardio room关闭和划船机不可用。A颠倒事实——这些仍然开放。C同样与通告相反。D完全没提到。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the new equipment?

options.A: The cost will be added to member fees this semester
options.B: The machines will replace only the rowing equipment
options.C: Demonstrations will be limited to certified members only
options.D: Staff want users to learn how the machines work properly

questions.explanation: 通告提供两次演示场次，可推知工作人员希望用户学会使用。A是无关推论。B过度推论——通告未说只换划船机。C颠倒事实——是预注册建议而非限制。

items.situation: annual outdoor movie night with blanket seating
items.announcement: Welcome, everyone. The Student Activities Board is excited to host its annual Outdoor Movie Night on the main quad this Saturday, May 16, at 8:30 p.m. This year's feature will be 'Pacific Crossing,' a documentary about ocean exploration. We will be providing limited folding chairs, so we strongly encourage attendees to bring their own blankets or beach towels for seating on the grass. Free popcorn and lemonade will be available at the refreshment tent near the fountain. Please note that the event will move indoors to the Hartley Gymnasium in the event of rain.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To recruit volunteers for the Student Activities Board
options.B: To advertise a new documentary release in theaters
options.C: To explain weather policies for outdoor campus events
options.D: To invite students to an annual outdoor film screening

questions.explanation: 通告核心是邀请学生参加年度户外电影。A完全跑题。B错——是校内放映，不是影院发行。C只是次要细节。

questions.stem: What are attendees encouraged to bring?

options.A: Folding chairs from their dorm rooms
options.B: A blanket or beach towel for grass seating
options.C: Their own popcorn and snacks
options.D: A waterproof jacket in case of rain

questions.explanation: 通告说带毯子或浴巾在草地上坐。A借用折叠椅词汇但是反——主办方提供折叠椅。C颠倒事实——爆米花是免费提供。D是话题相关但未要求带。

items.situation: LinkedIn profile photo day at career center
items.announcement: Good afternoon. The Career Services Office will be hosting LinkedIn Profile Photo Day this coming Thursday, October 22, in the Carver Career Center, Room 110. Professional photographers will be on site from 11 a.m. to 3 p.m. taking complimentary headshots for any registered student. Sign-ups must be completed through the career services portal by Tuesday at noon. Please come dressed in business or business-casual attire. We strongly recommend looking at the sample poses on our website beforehand. Walk-ins will only be accepted if photographer time slots remain available at the end of the day.

questions.stem: What must students do before Tuesday at noon?

options.A: Sign up through the career services portal
options.B: Submit their existing LinkedIn profile for review
options.C: Email the photographer with their preferred time
options.D: Buy formal attire from the campus bookstore

questions.explanation: 通告明确说周二中午前在career services portal注册。B凭空捏造，通告没要求提交profile。C改变了真实流程。D是话题相关但通告未要求。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about walk-in participants?

options.A: They must pay an additional photo session fee
options.B: They will receive priority over registered students
options.C: They may not get a slot if registrations fill the day
options.D: They will be photographed in the hallway instead

questions.explanation: 通告说walk-ins只在场次有空时才接受，可推知如果注册满了walk-ins可能轮不到。A过度推论。B完全相反。D完全无关。

items.announcement: Attention students. Due to weekend roof repairs, the main entrance of Hopkins Library will be closed from Friday, October 4 at 7:00 p.m. through Sunday, October 6 at 8:00 a.m. During this period, please use the side entrance on Oak Avenue. Twenty-four-hour study spaces and group rooms remain available with a valid student ID. Returns can still be dropped off at the drive-up box outside the Oak Avenue door. We're sorry for any inconvenience and appreciate your patience while we keep the building safe.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce a temporary entrance change due to repairs
options.B: To request student volunteers for library projects
options.C: To advertise a new twenty-four-hour study space
options.D: To explain a permanent change to library hours

questions.explanation: 通告主要告知因维修临时改入口。其他选项与文本不符。

questions.stem: What should students do during the repair period?

options.A: Avoid coming to the library entirely
options.B: Use the side entrance on Oak Avenue
options.C: Return all borrowed books before Friday
options.D: Schedule appointments for group rooms in advance

questions.explanation: 通告明确要求使用橡树大街侧门。其他选项与文本不符。

items.announcement: Good morning, students. The Economics Department is pleased to announce a guest lecture by Dr. Helena Park on Tuesday, November 12, at 4:30 p.m. in Linden Hall, Room 207. Dr. Park will speak about labor market shifts in coastal regions. Seating is limited, so please reserve a spot through the department website by Friday, November 8. A short reception will follow the lecture, and refreshments will be provided. We strongly encourage Economics majors and minors to attend, as the topic connects directly to material covered in upper-level courses.

questions.stem: What is the announcement primarily about?

options.A: A scholarship for Economics majors
options.B: A guest lecture and reservation deadline
options.C: A required examination in November
options.D: A change to the Economics department office hours

questions.explanation: 通告主要介绍客座讲座和预约截止日期。其他选项与内容不符。

questions.stem: What must students do to attend?

options.A: Pay a small registration fee in person
options.B: Submit a research summary to the department
options.C: Reserve a seat through the department website
options.D: Bring a printed copy of their major declaration

questions.explanation: 通告说必须通过院系网站预定座位。其他选项与文本不符。

items.announcement: Attention students, faculty, and staff. The campus shuttle route along North Ridge Road will be temporarily rerouted starting Monday, September 16, due to construction near the engineering complex. Buses will instead travel along Maple Street and stop at the South Quad. Service will continue every fifteen minutes during peak hours and every thirty minutes after 6:00 p.m. Please allow extra time for your commute during the first week, as drivers adjust to the new route. The original route is expected to resume by early October.

questions.stem: What is the announcement mainly about?

options.A: A temporary change to the campus shuttle route
options.B: A permanent expansion of the engineering complex
options.C: A new ridesharing service for students
options.D: A safety warning about North Ridge Road

questions.explanation: 通告主要讲临时改线。其他选项与文本不符。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about commuters during the first week?

options.A: They may experience longer travel times than usual
options.B: They must register for an alternate shuttle pass
options.C: They should avoid the South Quad area entirely
options.D: They will pay a temporary fare adjustment

questions.explanation: 通告建议预留更多时间，暗示通勤会更长。其他选项与文本不符。

items.situation: annual outdoor movie night with blanket seating
items.announcement: Good afternoon, students. The Campus Activities Office is excited to announce that our annual Outdoor Movie Night will take place this Friday, October 20, on the south lawn behind the library. The featured film will be a recent international documentary about urban beekeeping. Seating is blanket-style, so please bring your own blanket or low folding chair, as no rental chairs will be available this year. Doors and snack tables open at seven fifteen, and the projection begins promptly at eight o'clock once natural light fades. In case of rain, the screening will move indoors to the Waldman Auditorium with the same start time.

questions.stem: According to the announcement, what must students bring with them?

options.A: Their own blanket or low folding chair for seating
options.B: A printed ticket purchased from the activities office
