options.C: A handheld flashlight to use during the screening
options.D: A reusable cup for the snack table refreshments

questions.explanation: 公告明确指出由于今年不提供租用椅子，须自备毯子或低折叠椅，故 A 对。B、C、D 都未提及。

questions.stem: What can be inferred from the announcement?

options.A: The projection equipment cannot operate when natural light is still strong
options.B: Snack tables will remain closed during the film projection itself
options.C: The screening time will not change even if there is rain
options.D: The featured documentary will be shown only to graduate students

questions.explanation: 公告说雨天移至室内但起始时间不变，故 C 可推。A 把'自然光褪去开始'过度推断为设备无法运行；B、D 无依据。

items.situation: campus sustainability cleanup day
items.announcement: Attention students. The Sustainability Office is hosting our quarterly campus cleanup day this Saturday, October 21, beginning at nine in the morning. Volunteers should gather at the fountain plaza in front of Briarwood Hall. We'll provide gloves, trash grabbers, and a complimentary lunch from the dining commons for everyone who participates. Please register by Thursday evening through the sustainability portal so we can confirm head counts and pizza orders. No prior experience is required, and family members and friends are welcome to join as long as they also register on the portal in advance.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce a renovation of Briarwood Hall fountain plaza
options.B: To recruit volunteers for a quarterly campus cleanup day
options.C: To advertise a new course on sustainability and the environment
options.D: To remind students about an upcoming dining commons closure

questions.explanation: 公告整体在号召志愿者参与季度清洁日，B 对。A、C、D 均与公告核心目的不符。

questions.stem: According to the announcement, what will participants receive?

options.A: Cash payment delivered after their shift ends
options.B: Credit toward a future sustainability course offering
options.C: Discounted tickets to the next dining commons event
options.D: Gloves, trash grabbers, and a complimentary lunch

questions.explanation: 公告列出参与者得到手套、垃圾抓取器和餐厅免费午餐，故 D 对。A、B、C 都未提及。

items.situation: student lounge or study area closing for pipe/ceiling repair
items.announcement: Attention students, faculty, and staff. Due to a recent leak in the third-floor ceiling, the Harrington student lounge will be closed for repair from Monday, November 6, through Wednesday, November 8. During the closure, the alternative study area in the basement of Anderson Hall will extend its hours from seven in the morning until midnight. Vending machines and the printing station in the lounge will be temporarily unavailable, but a smaller print station will be set up just outside the Anderson Hall study area for the duration of the closure. We apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your patience.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain why ceiling leaks have become more common on campus
options.B: To recruit students to assist with the lounge repair work
options.C: To inform the campus community that the lounge will close for repair
options.D: To advertise newly added vending machines in Anderson Hall

questions.explanation: 公告核心是通知关闭和替代方案，C 对。A、B、D 均与公告意图不符。

questions.stem: According to the announcement, what hours will the Anderson Hall study area keep during the closure?

options.A: From seven in the morning until midnight
options.B: From nine in the morning until six in the evening
options.C: From eight in the morning until nine at night
options.D: Around the clock with no scheduled break

questions.explanation: 公告明确说'extend its hours from seven in the morning until midnight'，故 A 对。其余时段均与公告不符。

items.situation: campus shuttle route change due to construction
items.announcement: Attention students. Due to ongoing construction near the science quad, the campus shuttle will follow a temporary route starting Monday, October 16. The shuttle will skip the science quad stop and will instead stop at the lower library entrance and the visitor parking lot. The Linden Avenue stop is unaffected. Buses will run every twelve minutes between seven in the morning and ten at night. Please plan an extra five minutes if you usually transfer at the science quad. Live route updates and arrival times can be checked on the campus mobility app.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To inform students about a temporary change to the shuttle route
options.B: To request student feedback on shuttle stop locations
options.C: To announce a complete shutdown of the shuttle service
options.D: To advertise a new mobile application from the city government

questions.explanation: 公告通告临时改道，A 对。B 凭空发挥；C 与公告事实相反；D 与公告意图不符。

questions.stem: According to the announcement, what should riders allow extra time for?

options.A: Buying a new shuttle pass at the lower library entrance
options.B: Completing a survey on the campus mobility app
options.C: Transferring at the discontinued science quad stop
options.D: Walking around the closed Linden Avenue intersection

questions.explanation: 公告建议在原来科学方场换乘的乘客多留 5 分钟，故 C 对。A、B、D 都未提及。

items.situation: community garden spring cleanup volunteer event
items.announcement: Good morning, students. The Green Roots Club is recruiting volunteers for our annual spring cleanup of the campus community garden this Sunday, beginning at 8:30 a.m. behind Lincoln Hall. We'll be pulling weeds, turning over the soil, and planting this season's herb beds. Tools and gloves are all provided, but please wear closed-toe shoes and clothing you don't mind getting muddy. No gardening experience is needed, and you're welcome to come for just an hour or stay the whole morning. If you plan to join us, please sign up on the club's page by Friday so we can prepare enough snacks.

questions.stem: What are volunteers asked to wear to the event?

options.A: Closed-toe shoes and clothing that can get muddy
options.B: The official Green Roots Club t-shirt
options.C: Gardening gloves brought from home
options.D: A bright safety vest provided at sign-in

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告明确要求志愿者穿包脚趾的鞋和不怕弄脏的衣服。B选项是相关但未提及的，公告没有提到俱乐部T恤。C选项是错误细节，手套由活动提供，并非要求自带。D选项是相关但未提及的，公告完全没有提到安全背心。

questions.stem: Why does the speaker ask people to sign up by Friday?

options.A: Because volunteers must complete a safety training first
options.B: Because only a limited number of people can attend
options.C: To help organizers prepare enough snacks for everyone
options.D: Because experienced gardeners are given priority

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。公告说请在周五前报名，以便准备足够的零食，因此可推断报名是为了帮助组织者准备食物。A选项是过度推断，公告没有提到任何安全培训。B选项是无关推断，公告没有说人数有限制，反而欢迎大家随意参加。D选项与事实相反，公告说明无需园艺经验，并未给有经验者优先权。

items.situation: parking lot closure for alumni weekend with shuttle alternative
items.announcement: Attention students, faculty, and staff. Because of this weekend's Homecoming Alumni Reunion, the north-side parking structure and Lot F will be closed to regular permit holders beginning Friday at noon. These areas are being reserved for registered alumni guests throughout the event. To keep everyone moving, we'll run an expanded shuttle loop from the West Stadium overflow lot, with buses arriving every eight minutes from 7 a.m. to 9 p.m. Please don't leave vehicles in the closed lots after the deadline, as they may be ticketed. Normal parking access will resume on Monday morning. Thanks for your patience during the celebration.

questions.stem: Where can students park while the north-side lots are closed?

options.A: In Lot F with a temporary alumni pass
options.B: At the West Stadium overflow lot served by shuttles
options.C: Inside the north-side parking structure after noon
options.D: Along the main campus loop road on Saturday

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。公告说明在封闭期间会从西体育场溢出停车场开通加密班车，供大家停车换乘。A选项是错误细节，Lot F是保留给已登记的校友嘉宾的，不是凭临时通行证给学生用。C选项是相反意图，北侧停车楼正是被关闭的区域。D选项是相关但未提及的，公告没有提到在校园环路沿线停车。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about vehicles left in the closed lots after the deadline?

options.A: They will be moved to the overflow lot for free
options.B: They will be granted alumni guest status automatically
options.C: They can remain until Monday without consequence
options.D: Their owners risk receiving a parking ticket

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。公告提醒不要在截止时间后把车留在封闭停车场，否则可能被开罚单，由此可推断车主有被罚款的风险。A选项是无关推断，公告没有说会免费把车移走。B选项是过度推断，公告并未说留下的车会自动获得校友嘉宾身份。C选项是错误细节，正常停车要到周一才恢复，而留在封闭区的车会有后果。

items.situation: financial aid office workshop on scholarship applications
items.announcement: Good afternoon, students. The Financial Aid Office is hosting a free scholarship application workshop this coming Wednesday at 4 p.m. in the Student Services Center, Room 110. A coordinator will walk you through finding scholarships, writing strong personal statements, and avoiding common application mistakes. This session is open to all undergraduates, whether you're a first-year student or about to graduate. To get the most out of it, we recommend bringing a draft of your résumé and a list of scholarships you're interested in. No sign-up is needed, so just drop by. We hope this helps you find funding for next year.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce the winners of several scholarships
options.B: To remind students of a tuition payment deadline
options.C: To invite students to a workshop on scholarship applications
options.D: To require seniors to reapply for financial aid

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。公告的核心是邀请学生参加关于奖学金申请的免费工作坊。A选项是错误目的，公告没有宣布任何奖学金获奖者。B选项是错误目的，公告与学费缴纳截止日期无关。D选项是过度且不符的内容，公告说工作坊对所有本科生开放，并未要求毕业班学生重新申请助学金。

questions.stem: What are students advised to bring to the workshop?

options.A: A résumé draft and a list of scholarships
options.B: A signed financial aid award letter
options.C: Proof of enrollment from the registrar
options.D: A completed scholarship application form

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告建议学生带上简历草稿和感兴趣的奖学金清单。B选项是相关但未提及的，公告没有要求带助学金批准信。C选项是相关但未提及的，公告没有提到注册处的在读证明。D选项是错误细节，工作坊是教大家如何申请，而不是要求带已完成的申请表。

items.situation: cultural food festival organized by international club
items.announcement: Hello, everyone. The International Students Club is thrilled to invite you to our annual World Flavors Food Festival next Saturday from 12 p.m. to 5 p.m. on the Memorial Lawn. Student groups from more than fifteen countries will share traditional dishes, music, and craft demonstrations. Tasting tickets are just two dollars each and can be bought at the entrance, with all proceeds going toward next year's cultural events. If you'd like to volunteer at a booth, please email the club by Thursday so we can plan staffing. Come hungry, bring your friends, and enjoy an afternoon of food and culture.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To recruit new members for the International Students Club
options.B: To announce a change to the dining hall menu
options.C: To explain how to apply for a study-abroad program
options.D: To invite students to a cultural food festival

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。公告的核心是邀请大家参加国际学生俱乐部举办的世界风味美食节。A选项是错误目的，公告招募的是当天的志愿者，而不是俱乐部新成员。B选项是错误目的，公告与食堂菜单的变更无关。C选项是错误目的，公告完全没有提到出国留学项目的申请。

questions.stem: How can students obtain tasting tickets?

options.A: By emailing the club before Thursday
options.B: By purchasing them for two dollars at the entrance
options.C: By volunteering at one of the food booths
options.D: By presenting a valid student ID card

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。公告说明品尝券每张两美元，可在入口处购买。A选项是误置细节，周四前发邮件是为了报名当志愿者，而不是买券。C选项是误置细节，去摊位当志愿者与购买品尝券是两回事。D选项是相关但未提及的，公告没有提到需要出示学生证才能拿券。

items.situation: campus bookstore moving to a new building
items.announcement: Attention, students. Please note that the campus bookstore will be relocating to its new home on the ground floor of the Lewis Student Center. The current location in Foster Hall will close after this Friday, and the new store opens the following Monday at 9 a.m. The new space will offer expanded hours and a small café. During the move, online orders will continue as usual and can be picked up at the information desk. Be sure to update your bookmarks, since the store's web address will change as well.

questions.stem: What is the announcement mainly about?

options.A: The opening of a brand-new campus café
options.B: The bookstore moving to a new location
options.C: A short closure for building repairs
options.D: Changes to the main library's hours

questions.explanation: 公告核心是书店搬迁到新地点，B 正确。A 咖啡馆只是附带细节，过窄；C 并非临时维修关闭，而是永久搬迁；D 图书馆时间无关。

questions.stem: How can students get their online orders during the move?

options.A: By having them shipped to a dorm room
options.B: By visiting the old Foster Hall store
options.C: By waiting until the new store opens
options.D: By picking them up at the information desk

questions.explanation: 搬迁期间网订商品在问询台领取，D 正确。A 寄到宿舍未提；B 老店将关闭，张冠李戴；C 须等新店开业与原文矛盾。

items.situation: student art market in the quad
items.announcement: Hello, everyone! The Student Arts Council is excited to announce our first Spring Art Market, happening this Saturday from 11 a.m. to 4 p.m. on the main quad. Student artists will sell handmade jewelry, prints, ceramics, and much more, with all proceeds going directly to the creators. Admission is completely free, so bring your friends and some cash, since not every booth can accept cards. In case of rain, the market will simply move indoors to the Union ballroom. A few tables are still available for sellers who sign up by Thursday afternoon.

questions.stem: What are visitors advised to bring to the market?

options.A: A reusable shopping bag
options.B: Their student ID for entry
options.C: A completed seller registration form
options.D: Cash, since some booths cannot take cards

questions.explanation: 提醒带现金，因为有摊位不收卡，D 正确。A 购物袋未提；B 入场免费无需 ID，张冠李戴；C 报名表是卖家的事。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the market if it rains?

options.A: It will be canceled for the entire day
options.B: It will still take place, but indoors
options.C: Admission will then require a small fee
options.D: Only sellers who take cards may attend

questions.explanation: 下雨则改到 Union 舞厅室内举行，故仍会进行，B 正确。A 取消与原文相反；C 收费、D 限制卖家都无依据。

items.situation: temporary road closure and detour instructions
items.announcement: Good morning, everyone. Due to emergency water-main repairs, University Drive between the library and the dining hall will be fully closed to all traffic from this Wednesday at 7 a.m. until Friday evening. During this time, please follow the marked detour along Chestnut Avenue, which loops behind the gymnasium before rejoining the main campus road. We'll also be relocating the Wednesday farmers' market from its usual spot on University Drive to the plaza outside the student center. Crews will be working with heavy machinery, so we ask drivers and cyclists to slow down and watch for flaggers directing traffic near the repair zone.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain a temporary road closure and detour
options.B: To announce the cancellation of the farmers' market
options.C: To recruit volunteers for the water-main repairs
options.D: To encourage students to use University Drive

questions.explanation: 正确答案A：公告核心是因水管抢修，University Drive临时封闭并提供绕行路线，属于解释道路封闭与改道。B为wrong_purpose：农贸市场只是被搬到学生中心广场，并未取消，把次要信息当成了主旨。C为wrong_purpose：施工由工作人员负责，公告从未招募志愿者。D为reversed_intent：公告恰恰是要求大家避开被封闭的University Drive，与之相反。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the area near the repair zone?

options.A: It will reopen earlier than Friday evening
options.B: It is normally closed to cyclists
options.C: It may be hazardous to pass through quickly
options.D: It is located outside the student center

questions.explanation: 正确答案C：公告提到有重型机械作业，要求司机和骑行者减速并留意指挥交通的旗手，可推断该区域快速通过存在危险。A为over_inference：公告明确说封闭到周五傍晚，没有任何提前开放的依据。B为wrong_detail：公告并未说该路平时禁止骑行，只是提醒骑行者减速。D为wrong_detail：搬到学生中心广场的是农贸市场，而非维修区，属于错位的细节。

items.situation: campus shuttle route change due to construction
items.announcement: Attention students. Beginning this Monday, the campus shuttle will follow a new route while construction continues on Maple Street. Instead of stopping at the east gate, the shuttle will now pick up and drop off riders at the temporary stop in front of the recreation center. All other stops along the route will stay the same, and the shuttle will keep running every fifteen minutes from 7 a.m. to 9 p.m. We expect this change to last about a month. Updated route maps are posted at every stop and on the transportation page of the university website.

questions.stem: What is the announcement mainly about?

options.A: A new fee for riding the campus shuttle
options.B: The closing of the recreation center
options.C: A change to the campus shuttle route
options.D: An increase in shuttle service hours

questions.explanation: 正确答案C：公告主旨是因Maple Street施工，校园班车改走新路线，东门停靠点改到康乐中心前。A为related_but_not_stated：公告完全没有提到任何车费。B为wrong_detail：康乐中心是临时上下车点，并未关闭。D为wrong_detail：班车仍是每十五分钟一班、7点到21点，时间没有增加。

questions.stem: Where will the shuttle now stop instead of the east gate?

options.A: In front of the recreation center
options.B: On Maple Street near the construction
options.C: At the main library entrance
options.D: Behind the university dining hall

questions.explanation: 正确答案A：公告明确说班车不再停东门，改在康乐中心前的临时站点上下客。B为wrong_detail：Maple Street正在施工，恰恰是班车要避开的地方。C为related_but_not_stated：图书馆是合理地点但公告未提及。D为related_but_not_stated：餐厅同样未在公告中出现。

items.situation: LinkedIn profile photo day at career center
items.announcement: Good afternoon, students. The Career Center is excited to host our free LinkedIn Profile Photo Day this Thursday from 10 a.m. to 3 p.m. in the lobby of Bryson Hall. A professional photographer will be on site to take polished headshots that you can use on LinkedIn and other job applications, all at no cost. We recommend dressing in business attire to make the best impression. No appointment is needed, but spots fill up quickly, so we suggest arriving early. Photos will be emailed to you within two business days, so please be sure to check your university inbox.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce a workshop on writing resumes
options.B: To remind students to update their LinkedIn profiles
options.C: To recruit a photographer for the Career Center
options.D: To promote a free professional headshot event

questions.explanation: 正确答案D：公告主旨是宣传职业中心举办的免费LinkedIn证件照活动，由专业摄影师拍摄头像。A为wrong_purpose：公告是拍照活动，没有简历写作工作坊。B为too_narrow：更新LinkedIn只是照片用途之一，并非公告目的。C为reversed_intent：摄影师是已请好来服务学生的，公告并非招募摄影师。

questions.stem: What are students advised to do for the event?

options.A: Book an appointment online in advance
options.B: Wear business attire to the session
options.C: Bring a printed copy of their resume
options.D: Pay a small fee for the headshot

questions.explanation: 正确答案B：公告建议学生穿正装以留下最好印象。A为wrong_detail：公告明说无需预约，与此相反。C为related_but_not_stated：带简历是合理但公告未提及的做法。D为wrong_detail：活动是免费的，公告强调at no cost，不存在收费。

items.situation: third-floor study lounge closing for ceiling pipe repair
items.announcement: Attention students. The third-floor study lounge in the Bradley Library will be closed all next week, beginning this Monday, so that maintenance crews can repair a leaking ceiling pipe. We're sorry for the disruption, but the work can't be delayed any longer. During the closure, students may use the quiet study rooms on the first floor, which will stay open until midnight each night. Please remove any personal belongings from the lounge lockers before Friday at 5 p.m., since the lockers will be emptied during the repairs. We expect the lounge to reopen the following Monday. Thanks for your patience.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain a temporary closure of a study lounge
options.B: To introduce new midnight library hours
options.C: To encourage students to use the lockers more
options.D: To advertise a newly renovated reading room

questions.explanation: 正确答案A：通知的核心是图书馆三楼自习室因维修水管而临时关闭，并说明替代方案，A准确概括了整体目的。B错（too_narrow）：一楼安静自习室开到午夜只是临时替代细节，不是通知的主要目的。C错（reversed_intent）：通知实际上要求学生在周五前清空储物柜，而非鼓励多用储物柜，意思相反。D错（wrong_purpose）：通知里没有任何新装修阅览室的内容，这是一个貌似合理但与本通知无关的目的。

questions.stem: What must students do before Friday at 5 p.m.?

options.A: Reserve a first-floor quiet study room
options.B: Report leaking pipes to maintenance staff
options.C: Remove their belongings from the lounge lockers
options.D: Return library books to the third floor

questions.explanation: 正确答案C：通知明确要求学生在周五下午五点前从自习室储物柜取走个人物品，因为维修期间储物柜会被清空。A错（related_but_not_stated）：一楼自习室是替代场所，但通知没有要求预约。B错（misattributed_detail）：漏水的管道是维修人员要修的对象，并非要学生去报告。D错（related_but_not_stated）：通知完全没有提到还书。

items.situation: campus bookstore moving to a new building
items.announcement: Due to the expansion of the Student Services Center, the campus bookstore will be relocating to the ground floor of Kemper Hall starting next month. The current location on Maple Street will close permanently after March 20th, and the new store is set to open on March 25th. During the five-day gap between locations, all textbook orders and returns will be handled online through the bookstore's website. Please be aware that the new space offers extended evening hours and a larger café seating area. We appreciate your patience, and we're confident you'll enjoy the improved location.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To advertise the new café's menu items
options.B: To explain how to order textbooks online
options.C: To announce the bookstore's permanent closure
options.D: To inform students of the bookstore's relocation

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。通知的核心是告知校园书店将迁往Kemper Hall并说明相关时间安排。A错误（wrong_purpose）：更大的咖啡区只是新址的一个附带亮点，不是通知目的。B错误（too_narrow）：网上下单只针对五天过渡期，是细节而非主旨。C错误（reversed_intent）：书店是搬迁并重新开业，而非永久关闭，意思相反。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about textbook purchases during the five-day gap?

options.A: Prices will be discounted during the transition
options.B: Orders can still be placed online
options.C: Textbooks must be reserved before March 20th
options.D: All textbook sales will stop completely

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。通知说过渡期内所有教材订购和退货都通过书店网站在线处理，可推断学生仍然可以在线购买教材。A错误（over_inference）：通知从未提及任何折扣，属于过度推断。C错误（unrelated_inference）：3月20日是旧址关闭日期，通知没有要求在此前预订教材。D错误（wrong_detail）：实体店暂停并不等于所有销售停止，网上渠道仍在运作，与通知相矛盾。

items.situation: spring ethics symposium with limited seats and a reading prerequisite
items.announcement: Good morning, everyone. The Philosophy Department is hosting its annual Spring Ethics Symposium next Thursday in the Lindgren Seminar Room, starting at 1 p.m. Because the room seats only forty people, registration is required, and we'll close the list once we reach capacity. Please note that this year's sessions assume familiarity with the assigned readings, so you'll need to have finished the introductory ethics module before attending. To reserve a spot, sign up through the department's online calendar by this Tuesday. We're expecting a lively discussion, and we hope you'll join us.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce a symposium and its sign-up rules
options.B: To recruit new majors for the department
options.C: To describe the seminar room's seating limit
options.D: To cancel this year's ethics symposium

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。整篇通知围绕春季伦理研讨会的时间、地点以及必须提前报名的规则展开。B错误（wrong_purpose）：通知面向已有学生，从未提到招募新专业学生。C错误（too_narrow）：仅能容纳四十人只是解释为何要报名的一个细节，无法概括主旨。D错误（reversed_intent）：通知是宣布研讨会照常举办并开放报名，而非取消，意思相反。

questions.stem: What must students do before attending the symposium?

options.A: Arrive at the seminar room by noon
options.B: Submit a short writing sample in advance
options.C: Complete the introductory ethics module
options.D: Bring a printed copy of the calendar

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通知明确指出今年的场次默认参加者熟悉指定读物，因此需要在参加前完成入门伦理模块。A错误（wrong_detail）：研讨会下午1点开始，通知没有要求中午前到场，把时间弄错了。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：通知从未提到需要提交写作样本。D错误（misattributed_detail）：在线日历是用来报名的渠道，通知并未要求带打印版日历，属于把细节张冠李戴。

items.situation: community garden spring cleanup volunteer event
items.announcement: Attention students. The Campus Green Initiative is organizing a spring cleanup of the community garden this Saturday, and we'd love your help. We'll meet at 9 a.m. behind Dawson Hall to clear out old plant beds and spread fresh mulch before planting season. All tools and work gloves will be provided, but we ask that you wear closed-toe shoes and clothes you don't mind getting muddy. To help us plan food and supplies, please register on our page by Thursday evening. Volunteers who stay through the afternoon will receive a free lunch from the campus food truck.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain which tools will be supplied
options.B: To recruit volunteers for a garden cleanup
options.C: To advertise a new gardening course
options.D: To announce the garden's permanent closure

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。通知的核心是号召学生本周六来社区花园帮忙清理和铺设覆盖物，是一次志愿者招募。A错误（too_narrow）：主办方提供工具只是一个细节，不能概括通知目的。C错误（wrong_purpose）：通知从未提及任何园艺课程。D错误（reversed_intent）：活动是清理并为播种季做准备，而非永久关闭花园，意思正好相反。

questions.stem: What are volunteers asked to wear?

options.A: The gloves they bring from home
options.B: A bright reflective safety vest
options.C: A campus food-truck staff uniform
options.D: Closed-toe shoes and old clothes

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。通知要求志愿者穿包脚的鞋子和不怕弄脏的旧衣服。A错误（wrong_detail）：手套由主办方提供，无需自带，通知把提供与自带弄反了。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：通知从未提到反光安全背心。C错误（misattributed_detail）：食品车只是提供午餐，通知没有要求志愿者穿食品车工作服，属于把细节安错对象。

items.situation: campus recreation center switching to reduced summer hours
items.announcement: Due to lower attendance over the summer term, the Rec Center will move to reduced hours beginning next Monday, June 15th. From that date until August, the building will open at 7 a.m. and close at 8 p.m. on weekdays, rather than staying open until midnight. Weekend hours stay the same, running from 9 a.m. to 6 p.m. Please be aware that the rock-climbing wall will only be staffed in the mornings, so afternoon climbers will need to plan around that. Group fitness classes will continue on their normal schedule, and we'll post the updated calendar at the front desk.

questions.stem: What change will take effect starting June 15th?

options.A: The center will close for the entire summer
options.B: Membership fees will be reduced for summer
options.C: Weekday hours will be shortened until August
options.D: Weekend hours will be extended to midnight

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通知说从6月15日起到八月，工作日的开放时间缩短为早7点到晚8点，不再营业到午夜。A错误（wrong_detail）：中心只是缩短时间，并非整个夏天关闭，与通知矛盾。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：通知从未提到会员费下调。D错误（misattributed_detail）：午夜是原来工作日的关门时间，通知里周末时段保持9点到18点不变，把细节错安到了周末。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about rock climbing in the afternoon?

options.A: Climbers may be unable to use the wall then
options.B: The climbing wall will be permanently shut down
options.C: Climbing lessons will move to the weekends
options.D: The wall stays staffed throughout the whole day

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通知说攀岩墙只在上午有工作人员值守，下午的攀岩者需要另作安排，可推断下午可能无法使用攀岩墙。B错误（over_inference）：只是下午无人值守，通知从未说要永久关闭攀岩墙，属于过度推断。C错误（unrelated_inference）：通知没有任何关于攀岩课程改到周末的信息，属凭空推断。D错误（wrong_detail）：通知明确说只在上午值守，与全天有人值守直接矛盾。

items.situation: advising office information session on applying to graduate school
items.announcement: Good afternoon, students. The Academic Advising Office is holding an information session on applying to graduate school this coming Wednesday at 4 p.m. in Room 108 of the Torres Building. An advisor will walk you through choosing programs, requesting recommendation letters, and meeting application deadlines. This session is especially useful for juniors and seniors who are considering advanced degrees, though everyone's welcome. If you'd like personalized help, bring a draft of your personal statement, and an advisor can look it over afterward. No registration is needed, so please just drop by.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To collect students' completed applications
options.B: To explain how to request recommendation letters
options.C: To discourage students from graduate study
options.D: To publicize a graduate school info session

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。通知的核心是宣传一场关于申请研究生院的信息说明会，介绍时间、地点和内容。A错误（wrong_purpose）：说明会只是提供指导，并不收取任何已完成的申请材料。B错误（too_narrow）：如何索取推荐信只是说明会内容之一，不能概括主旨。C错误（reversed_intent）：通知是鼓励并帮助学生申请研究生，而非劝退，意思相反。

questions.stem: What should students bring if they want personalized help?

options.A: A finished graduate school application
options.B: A draft of their personal statement
options.C: Two completed recommendation letters
options.D: A signed advising registration form

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。通知说，如果想获得个性化帮助，请带上一份个人陈述的草稿，顾问可以当场帮你看。A错误（wrong_detail）：说明会讨论如何申请，并不需要带已完成的申请，与情境不符。C错误（related_but_not_stated）：通知只提到会讲解如何索取推荐信，并未要求带两封推荐信。D错误（misattributed_detail）：通知明确说无需报名，直接来即可，因此不存在要带的报名表，属细节张冠李戴。

items.situation: new student orientation schedule and requirements
items.announcement: Welcome to campus, first-year students. This is a quick reminder about next week's new student orientation, which is required for everyone starting this fall. Orientation runs Monday through Wednesday, with all sessions held in Ferris Auditorium beginning at 9 a.m. sharp. On the first day, you'll pick up your ID card and class schedule, so please bring a photo ID to confirm your identity. Lunch will be provided each day in the adjoining dining hall. If you have a schedule conflict, you'll need to email the orientation office before Friday to arrange a make-up session.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To give details about a required orientation
options.B: To advertise optional weekend campus tours
options.C: To explain where lunch will be served
options.D: To tell students orientation is canceled

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通知的核心是向新生说明下周必修的新生迎新活动的日程和相关要求。B错误（wrong_purpose）：通知从未提及任何可选的校园参观。C错误（too_narrow）：每天在餐厅提供午餐只是一个细节，不能概括通知目的。D错误（reversed_intent）：通知强调迎新活动是必修且照常举行，而非取消，意思相反。

questions.stem: What must students bring on the first day?

options.A: Their finalized fall class schedule
options.B: A completed campus housing form
options.C: A photo ID to confirm identity
options.D: An email from the orientation office

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通知说第一天要领取学生证和课表，因此请带上带照片的证件以确认身份。A错误（wrong_detail）：课表是当天在现场领取的，并不需要自己带来，通知把领取与自带弄反了。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：通知从未提到住宿表格。D错误（misattributed_detail）：给迎新办公室发邮件是有时间冲突时才需要做的事，并非第一天要带的东西，属于把细节安错场景。

items.situation: parking lot closure for alumni weekend with shuttle alternative
items.announcement: Attention students, faculty, and staff. Due to this year's Homecoming Alumni Weekend, the North Campus parking garage will be closed to regular permit holders from Friday, October 10th, through Sunday evening. During that time, the garage is reserved for registered alumni guests only. To make up for the lost spaces, we'll be running a free shuttle every fifteen minutes between the Riverside overflow lot and the main quad, from 7 a.m. until 11 p.m. Any permit vehicles left in the garage after Thursday at midnight may be ticketed. We appreciate your patience during this busy weekend.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To invite students to Homecoming alumni events
options.B: To announce a permanent change to parking permits
options.C: To inform about a temporary parking closure and shuttle
options.D: To describe the shuttle's new route around campus

questions.explanation: C 正确：通告告知因校友周末车库暂时关闭，并提供免费班车作为替代，这是整段主旨。A 错(wrong_purpose)：通告没有邀请学生参加校友活动，只是说明停车安排。B 错(reversed_intent)：关闭只从周五到周日，是临时性的，说成永久改动与事实相反。D 错(too_narrow)：班车线路只是解决方案中的一个细节，不能概括全段。

questions.stem: What must permit holders do to avoid being ticketed?

options.A: Remove their vehicles before Thursday at midnight
options.B: Sign up for a permit on the parking website
options.C: Move their cars into the North Campus garage
options.D: Purchase a special weekend parking pass

questions.explanation: A 正确：通告说周四午夜后仍留在车库的持证车辆可能被开罚单，因此需在此前把车开走。B 错(related_but_not_stated)：网上注册停车许可听起来合理，但通告并未提及。C 错(reversed_intent)：北校区车库正是被关闭的地方，把车开进去恰恰相反。D 错(wrong_detail)：通告未提任何周末停车付费票，属编造的事实。

items.situation: computer lab relocating to a different floor
items.announcement: Good afternoon. Please be aware that the main computer lab in the library is moving from the third floor to the newly renovated first floor, effective Monday, November 3rd. The new space offers forty additional workstations, a dedicated printing area, and extended hours until 2 a.m. during exam weeks. While the move is underway this weekend, all third-floor machines will be unavailable, so we recommend saving any files you need to personal or cloud storage beforehand. Staff will be on hand near the first-floor entrance to help you locate the new lab. Your library card will still be required to log in.

questions.stem: Where will the computer lab be located after the move?

options.A: On the third floor of the library
options.B: In a separate building near the quad
options.C: Beside the printing area on the second floor
options.D: On the renovated first floor of the library

questions.explanation: D 正确：通告明确说机房从三楼迁到翻修一新的一楼。A 错(wrong_detail)：三楼是搬迁前的旧址，不是新位置。B 错(related_but_not_stated)：搬到另一栋楼听似合理，但通告只说在图书馆内部换楼层。C 错(misattributed_detail)：打印区是一楼新空间的配置，把它说成二楼是错误拼接。

questions.stem: Why does the speaker recommend saving files beforehand?

options.A: Because personal storage is now required for all students
options.B: Because the machines will be inaccessible during the move
options.C: Because library cards will stop working over the weekend
options.D: Because printing will be unavailable on the first floor

questions.explanation: B 正确：通告说搬迁期间三楼所有机器都不能用，因此建议提前把文件存到个人或云端，可推断是为了应对机器暂时无法访问。A 错(over_inference)：只是建议保存文件，并未规定所有学生都必须使用个人存储，属过度推断。C 错(unrelated_inference)：通告说图书馆卡照旧用来登录，并未说周末失效。D 错(misattributed_detail)：一楼新增了专门打印区，说一楼不能打印与通告相悖。

items.situation: annual outdoor movie night with blanket seating
items.announcement: Attention students! The Film Society is thrilled to host our annual Outdoor Movie Night this Saturday, September 20th, on the Memorial Lawn behind the library. We'll be screening a classic adventure film on a giant inflatable screen, with the show starting at dusk, around 8 p.m. Seating is on the grass, so please bring a blanket or a low lawn chair to stay comfortable. Free popcorn and hot cider will be handed out near the entrance while supplies last. In case of rain, we'll move the event indoors to Foster Auditorium. No tickets are needed, so just show up and enjoy!

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To invite students to an outdoor film screening
options.B: To recruit new members for the Film Society
options.C: To cancel this year's movie night because of rain
options.D: To describe the history of a classic adventure film

questions.explanation: A 正确：通告的核心是邀请学生参加电影社的年度户外电影之夜。B 错(wrong_purpose)：通告没有招募社员的内容，只是在宣传活动。C 错(reversed_intent)：下雨只是改到室内 Foster Auditorium，而非取消活动，与事实相反。D 错(too_narrow)：只提到会放一部经典冒险片，并未介绍其历史，且这不是整段目的。

questions.stem: What are students asked to bring to the event?

options.A: Their own popcorn and drinks
options.B: A ticket purchased in advance
options.C: A blanket or a low lawn chair
options.D: An umbrella in case of rain

questions.explanation: C 正确：通告说座位在草地上，请自带毯子或矮脚椅以便舒适入座。A 错(misattributed_detail)：爆米花和热苹果酒是现场免费发放的，不需要自带。B 错(wrong_detail)：通告明说无需门票，直接来即可。D 错(related_but_not_stated)：下雨的安排是移到室内，通告从未让学生带伞。

items.situation: community garden spring cleanup volunteer event
items.announcement: The Campus Green Team needs volunteers for the community garden's spring cleanup this Saturday, starting at 8 a.m. behind Merrill Hall. We'll be pulling winter weeds, turning the soil, and rebuilding the raised beds that collapsed over the break. Gloves and hand tools are provided, but you'll want boots you don't mind getting muddy. Anyone who stays through the full morning shift earns a plot in the summer growing program, which usually fills up fast. Sign up on the Green Team page by Thursday so we can plan the work crews.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To recruit volunteers for a garden cleanup
options.B: To announce the summer growing program results
options.C: To explain new rules for the garden
options.D: To cancel all of this weekend's outdoor events

items.situation: grand reopening of a renovated art gallery
items.announcement: The Hartley Art Gallery reopens next Tuesday after three months of renovations to its lighting and climate control. The first-floor exhibit space is now twice its old size, and we've added a print study room you can book by appointment. To celebrate, we're hosting a free reception in the main atrium next Tuesday at 6 p.m., with a short talk from the curator. Your student ID gets you in, and the first hundred guests receive a signed poster. Regular gallery hours resume Wednesday.

items.situation: campus shuttle route change due to road construction
items.announcement: Starting next Monday, the Blue Line shuttle will skip the Library Circle stop while crews rebuild the road there. For the next three weeks, it'll detour along Fenwick Street and pick up riders at the temporary stop outside the Student Union instead. Buses run every fifteen minutes, though the detour adds about five minutes to each loop, so plan a little extra time for morning classes. The updated route map is posted at every shelter and on the transit app. We'll switch back to the normal route once paving is finished.

items.situation: study lounge closing for pipe repair
items.announcement: Good afternoon, students. The fourth-floor study lounge in Beckman Library will be closed all next week while plumbers replace a leaking pipe above the ceiling. Work begins Monday at 7 a.m., and it'll wrap up by Friday afternoon. If you usually study there, the quiet reading room on the second floor stays open until midnight, and the group rooms can be booked online. Please clear any personal belongings from the lounge lockers before Friday, since the crew needs full access to the space. We're sorry for the timing so close to midterms.

items.situation: new student orientation schedule and requirements
items.announcement: Attention new students. Fall orientation runs from Wednesday, August 27th through Friday the 29th, and attendance at the Wednesday morning session is required before you can register for classes. Check-in opens at 8 a.m. in Foster Hall, where you'll pick up your ID card and course packet. Thursday and Friday cover optional workshops on campus resources, from the writing center to student clubs. Bring a photo ID and your admission letter to check-in. If you miss the Wednesday session, you'll need to schedule a make-up meeting with your advisor.

items.situation: LinkedIn profile photo day at career center

items.situation: campus dining hall switching to summer hours
items.announcement: Good morning, everyone. Starting Monday, May 12th, the Commons dining hall shifts to its summer schedule. These hours hold through the end of August, when the fall schedule returns. If you're on a meal plan, your swipes carry over as usual, so there's nothing you need to do. items.announcement: Attention students and faculty. The Philosophy Department's spring symposium on the ethics of artificial intelligence takes place Friday, April 3rd, in the Whitcomb Seminar Room. items.situation: interdisciplinary conference call for papers
items.announcement: Submissions are now open for the annual Interdisciplinary Research Conference, held this year on Saturday, October 18th in Lindley Hall. Accepted work can be shown as either a talk or a poster, so mention your preference when you submit. Presenting here's a great way to get feedback before you submit to a larger journal.
